programme.title: Life Today With James and Betty Robison
programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Military Makeover: Final Reveal of the Crozier Home Makeover
programme.desc: On this finale of the makeover, the Croziers finally get to see their finished home makeover. You don't want to miss out on the much-needed, fun, creative, and incredibly heartfelt surprises that this exceptional veteran and his family uncover.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Bad Blood
programme.desc: As Derek and April work around the clock to find a solution for the hospital, Cristina struggles to respect the wishes of a family whose son is dying.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: The Face of Change
programme.desc: Competition heats up as several of the doctors fight to become the new face of Seattle Grace; April brings in an emergency case, and Jackson and Alex work with a transgender teen couple.

programme.title: The Closer: Executive Order
programme.desc: The murder of two paramedics leads the LSPD and the FBI on two separate investigations on a case that could be the precursor to a major terrorist attack. Brenda fights to remain a step ahead while working with the counter-terrorism unit.

programme.title: The Closer: Old Money
programme.desc: One of Brenda's detectives is ambushed on the street and the main clue to figuring out the motive behind the attack is a garbage bag containing more than $37,500.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A foreigner is found murdered inside his hotel room. The squad must work quickly to find the killer while avoiding any international repercussions when a U.S. diplomat becomes involved in the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Jane Doe #38
programme.desc: After finding a young runaway murdered and thrown in a trash can, the Major Crimes unit is led on a long, puzzling hunt to find the deceased girl's killer and her identity. Meanwhile, Ryador consults her husband about a proposition she has for Rusty.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Two Options
programme.desc: The shooting deaths of an elderly couple in their home prompts the team to join forces with the Special Operations Bureau to track down a deadly predator prowling Los Angeles and taking prisoners along the way.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Cutting Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Mike Tao of Major Crimes finds himself doing double duty when the star of the cop show on which he moonlights as a consultant becomes the prime suspect in the murder of his biggest fan.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Sweet Revenge
programme.desc: The mysterious murder of a tech-entrepreneur with questionable morals and possible mob connections has the division working overtime. Meanwhile, Rusty struggles to feel accepted when Raydor's son Ricky comes to visit.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Hit That Wasn't
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, the brazen killing of a state's witness leads police to an alleged hitman but the evidence against him could be nothing more than smoke and mirrors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Buddhist Monk Murders
programme.desc: Several monks are found massacred at a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Footpath Murders
programme.desc: British detectives teamed up with a pioneering scientist to crack a case of sexual assault and serial murder. This 1986 case marked the first time DNA was used as evidence in a court of law.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Planted Evidence
programme.desc: A woman is found beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped outside of Phoenix. The nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer than any other single piece of evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Southside Strangler
programme.desc: Learn how investigators caught Timothy Wilson Spencer, better known as the Southside Strangler, a serial killer responsible for the murders of five women in Virginia. This was the first use of DNA profiling in the U.S. justice system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Legionnaires' Disease
programme.desc: History was made in Philadelphia in the summer of 1976 -- not because of the bicentennial, but because of the mysterious death of 34 Legionnaires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Wilson Murder
programme.desc: An eye doctor is found beaten to death, by his wife. When police arrest an itinerant painter for the murder, he accuses the wife and her sister of hiring him to kill the doctor. Investigators must use forensic science to work out just what happen.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skirting the Evidence
programme.desc: A woman won $5,000 at the Blackjack table then, three hours later, was kidnapped. A month after that, she was found dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naughty or Nyce
programme.desc: Footprints leading away from a car accident point police in a new direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Room With a View
programme.desc: The victim had been stabbed more than a hundred times and her bedroom was soaked with blood. While her body was positioned in a suggestive way, she hadn't been sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writing on the Wall
programme.desc: A gorgeous flight attendant is brutally murdered in her own home and the laundry list of suspects is growing by the minute. A striking clue at the scene leads investigators in the wrong direction, but will forensic evidence get them back on track?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hundreds of Reasons
programme.desc: A well-liked assistant manager of a Florida steakhouse in murdered while he closes his restaurant for the night.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unmasked
programme.desc: A serial rapist was on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hunting Human Beings Part 1
programme.desc: After a 40-year manhunt, investigators finally find their needle in a DNA haystack and unmask a man who they suspect as California’s most prolific serial killer.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Golden State Killer: Hiding in Plain Sight Part 2
programme.desc: The Golden State Killer has been identified by law enforcement as Joseph James DeAngelo. Now accused of committing some of California’s most heinous crimes, this man was hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: Terror in the Wilderness Part 1
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker was one of the most prolific rapists and serial killers in Alaska’s history. For more than a decade, he kidnapped young women and brought them into the wilderness where he shot them like prey, until one woman escaped.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Butcher Baker: The Girls Who Got Away Part 2
programme.desc: The Butcher Baker serial killer was hiding in plain sight. He presented himself as a soft-spoken family man and was prowling the streets at night, stalking his prey. One woman’s story led police to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: The Raneys tackle a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse in Missouri. Marty works to overhaul the entire base of the cabin. Misty constructs a greenhouse out of scavenged windows, and Matt builds a workshop for the Oglesbys' leather goods business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Risky Business
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: The Raneys push their limits to finish two cabins with winter pressing down on them. A risky project results in an injury that threatens to make them lose it all.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Stairway to Heaven
programme.desc: With added features and bonus scenes: The Raneys scramble to finish cabin walls and staircases before winter hits. Matt leads a desperate effort to keep the family stocked with meat through spring.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: As a harsh winter storm approaches, the Raneys embark on a quick mini-rescue. The clan then rushes to seal Misty's cabin but a devastating fire threatens the homestead and derails their homestead plans.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Volcano's Edge
programme.desc: The Raneys put their ingenuity to the test on a homestead in Hawaii that was destroyed by 20-foot thick lava flow. First they must bring life back to the property, then figure out how to make the structures mobile in case of another eruption.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch: Winter's Wrath
programme.desc: As a harsh winter storm approaches, the Raneys embark on a quick mini-rescue. The clan then rushes to seal Misty's cabin but a devastating fire threatens the homestead and derails their homestead plans.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Line of Fire
programme.desc: Marty has to create an evacuation ark for livestock while Matt devises a layer of fire protection to save a homestead in danger of a wildfire.

programme.title: Expedition X: UFOs Over New Mexico
programme.desc: Responding to recent UFO sightings, Josh Gates sends his team to New Mexico for a new investigation into the infamous, unsolved Socorro Landing Incident. Unleashing never-before-used technology and with new witnesses, Jess and Phil look to solve Socorro.

programme.title: Josh Gates Tonight: The Great Joshdini
programme.desc: Josh gets magical with Lord of the Rings' Dominic Monaghan and Billy Boyd, Carbonaro Effect's Michael Carbonaro, Deadliest Catch: Bloodline's Josh Harris and Casey McManus, and comic Nate Bargatze. Josh trains to be Piff the Magic Dragon's assistant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Wildcat Garage
programme.desc: Deer season is well underway across Texas. In East Texas, Game Wardens find a bobcat a new home and investigate an illegally killed deer. On the coast, the Texas Game Wardens deal with an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Owl Gone Bad
programme.desc: It's the opening of deer and oyster season in Texas. On the Gulf, Game Wardens find illegal undersized oysters. In East Texas, Game Wardens patrol deer camps. An owl is rescued from a chicken coop and set free.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Range Ridin'
programme.desc: When the ranch comes under fire from encroaching hunters, Gabe takes it upon himself to learn to ride a horse as the family constructs a fence around the property. And later, Gabe and Raquell leave the mountain for the birth of their baby girl.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bush Below Zero
programme.desc: A life-threatening cold front approaches the mountain and the family prioritizes shelters for their livestock. The task is easier said than done, as it will require the siblings to make a risky journey to a neighboring mountain to salvage lumber.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Water to Ice
programme.desc: A deep freeze halts the water supply, sending the ranch into a new crisis. And with a critical load of lumber delivered to the base of their mountain, the Wolfpack must problem solve to get their house back on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Bottle for Your Thoughts
programme.desc: Bear overnights in the wild as he absorbs life-changing news. A gentler Bam takes the lead on a critical next step of the main house build, while Noah creates a Bush Monster Plow to clear heavy snow. Sister Bird makes an unusual gift for Gabe.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: The Land Giveths and Takeths
programme.desc: As winter winds down, the Browns prepare for a medieval-themed birthday celebration for Baby Eli. Pushing through the pandemic, the Browns complete the main house just before a massive wildfire strikes the mountain.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: No Country for Gold Men
programme.desc: As the mid-summer Colorado heat bears down on the team, Jesse heads to Montana to salvage parts from the old washplant and Dave struggles to keep the operation together for another major gold haul.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: There's Something About Jerry
programme.desc: Tammy's boyfriend, Jerry, comes to visit just in time to celebrate the sisters' favorite holiday: Halloween. Tammy's sister Misty, however, questions Jerry's intentions. Amy has to face another weigh-in after her concerning appointment with Dr. Procter.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Brandon's Story
programme.desc: Brandon is a talented musician with a beautiful voice and a run-away weight problem. He wants more than to lose weight, he wants a career and he wants to take the next step with his girlfriend Taylor whom he risks losing if he can't make a change.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Jeanne and Brandon: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Jeanne struggles to care for herself in the aftermath of her dad's death. Brandon strives to get his weight down in order to feel confident when proposing to his girlfriend Tayler and be the man she deserves.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Cynthia's Story
programme.desc: Cynthia is a 610-lb single mother raising five kids. She's been focused on her children, but now realizes what her death would mean for them. As she battles her emotions and the pressures of life, she is forced to fight even harder to save her own life.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Jeanne and Brandon: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Jeanne struggles to care for herself in the aftermath of her dad's death. Brandon strives to get his weight down in order to feel confident when proposing to his girlfriend Tayler and be the man she deserves.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Cynthia's Story
programme.desc: Cynthia is a 610-lb single mother raising five kids. She's been focused on her children, but now realizes what her death would mean for them. As she battles her emotions and the pressures of life, she is forced to fight even harder to save her own life.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: 20 Years of Trent and Amber
programme.desc: Trent and Amber are celebrating their 20th anniversary by spending the night at a B&B, and they leave Anna in charge.

programme.title: 7 Little Johnstons: Love in Lederhosen
programme.desc: The Johnstons head to a Bavarian-style village in the Georgia mountains for a fun family weekend. There's something for everyone: candy, outdoor adventure and tchotchkes galore. The family tries to recreate the adventure at home by building a zipline.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: The Roloff Quaranteam
programme.desc: Matt's frustration grows as Amy continues to delay her move out of the farmhouse, but when COVID-19 hits, everything comes to a stop. The families come to terms with their new normal, and Zach and Jackson celebrate their birthdays in quarantine.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Farmhouse Farewell
programme.desc: Matt clears out the farmhouse for the new renter. Meanwhile, Zach has a revelation that could change the future of the farm forever.

programme.title: Little People, Big World: Let's Rumble
programme.desc: Wedding planning gets real for Amy and Chris, but they may not be on the same page. Zach contemplates living on the farm and all that entails. Amy and Chris' housewarming party has some unexpected twists, especially when Matt and Caryn show up.

programme.title: Unexpected: This Damn Car Seat
programme.desc: Jenna gives birth to a baby boy. Lawrence is feeling the pressure as Lilly nears her due date. Liliana meets baby Attalie for the first time, but her criticism of Myrka goes too far. Tyra and Tiarra head to Louisville, Kentucky, for girl time with Hailey.

programme.title: Unexpected: Grandma Fail
programme.desc: Jenna and Aden introduce their family to baby Luca. Myrka worries that her stable home with Ethan's family is crumbling. Lilly and Lawrence worry for their baby's life when LJ is born completely silent.

programme.title: Unexpected: He Wasn't Breathing
programme.desc: Lilly and Lawrence bring their new baby home. Michelle shares devastating news with Ethan and Myrka. Tyra and Alex part ways.

programme.title: Unexpected: Tell All Part 1
programme.desc: The young moms meet for the first time. Rilah's mom confronts Anthony's mother. Chloe reveals information about her relationship with Max, and Max opens up about his addiction. Hailey and Tanya take on Matthew, and Hailey 2 joins them on stage.

programme.title: Extreme Sisters: Sister, Sister

programme.desc: Veggie master Daniel Angerer and barbeque guru Mike Johnson have been waiting for a second shot at Bobby Flay. Katie Lee and Daphne Oz determine who gets the chance to face Bobby again.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Dark Horses Still Kick
programme.desc: Food truck owner Ed Hardy and Indian chef Kunal Lamba are here to prove there's more than meets the eye. Bobby Flay's friends, actress Debi Mazar and chef Geoffrey Zakarian, are praying that one of these chefs can help break their own losing streaks.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Smile Now, Cry Later
programme.desc: Comedian Judah Friedlander and Chef Michael Symon team up for a battle - finding a competitor to beat Bobby Flay. They will be watching Jason Fullilove duke it out against Billy Olivia.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: All in the Family
programme.desc: Sassy Miami chef Mika Leon brings the heat against Atlanta chef Michael Bertozzi. Chef Carla Hall and actor Jesse Tyler Ferguson decide who has what it takes to join their modern family for a food fight against Bobby Flay.

programme.desc: Katie Lee and Marcus Samuelsson hold nothing back as they aim to get Bobby beat. They take no chances with Canada's Alida Solomon and Italian Pasquale Cozzolino.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Going Global

programme.desc: It's dove season in Texas, the start of hunting season. In Beaumont, road hunters get an early start on deer season during a decoy sting. Near Texarkana, a rogue gator is lassoed. On the Gulf Coast, undersized angling means citations.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: New Blood
programme.desc: Two new rookies from the 59th cadet class of Texas Game Wardens work their first cases. Game wardens rescue softshell turtles caught on illegal trotlines on Llano River. In East Texas, the search is on for a hunter lost in the Big Thicket Preserve.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Uncuffed: On the Run
programme.desc: Poor weather results in a bad car accident and a neighbour dispute requires game wardens to intervene. Wardens Richards and McGee search for a felon who could be illegally hunting deer. Herchman rescues a severely injured owl.

programme.title: Louisiana Law: Monster Crabber
programme.desc: Deep in the woods and bayous of Louisiana, Wildlife Agents protect the state's resources. A crab fisherman is caught stealing dozens of traps, a hunter crosses state lines with an illegal deer, and Agents rescue an injured bald eagle.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: In Hot Water
programme.desc: Dockery responds to a call about an alligator found near a residential area. The game wardens find blood in a hunter's car after a hunter claimed he didn't shoot anything. Boone follows up on a call about five racoons making their way into someone's home.

programme.desc: Poor weather results in a bad car accident and a neighbour dispute requires game wardens to intervene. Wardens Richards and McGee search for a felon who could be illegally hunting deer. Herchman rescues a severely injured owl.

programme.desc: Across the state, Texas game wardens are busy enforcing fish and game law. An injured bald eagle needs medical attention. Game wardens go undercover to catch someone selling illegal alligator parts. A tip leads to an angler with multiple undersized fish.

programme.desc: Pete and his team embark on a quest to an idyllic farm in Waxhaw, NC with orders to craft an elegant English retreat with a hanging bed fit for a queen. But one thing might stand in the way of Pete and his holy grail of pastoral treehouse builds, goats!

programme.title: Tanked!: Popcorn on the High Seas
programme.desc: Wayde and Brett are recruited by Westfield Mall to fabricate two tanks including a Navy-inspired sailboat aquarium to spice up the mall's new food court.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Don't Blow It
programme.desc: Tia gives each of the parolees an opportunity to pursue their dreams, but for Bryan the path is rockier and could end in disaster.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Heart Broken
programme.desc: Tia's daughter faces a difficult decision when her beloved dog's health takes a turn for the worse. Then, Tia sends her team to rescue a mother pit bull and her puppies from horrific conditions in an abandoned home.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: River Monsters: Cold Blooded Horror
programme.desc: The River Monsters in Japan are like no others Jeremy has ever encountered, from the devastating earthquake-causing catfish, the Namazu, to the sinister, child-snatching killer called the Kappa.

programme.title: Movie: Friday
programme.desc: Two friends must come up with $200, to pay drug dealer Big Worm for marijuana they smoked.

programme.title: Movie: Next Friday
programme.desc: A streetwise man visits his cousin and his uncle, who have recently won the lottery.

programme.title: Movie: Friday After Next
programme.desc: Two cousins move in together and work as nighttime security guards. Their house is robbed on Christmas Eve and they team up to track the criminal down.

programme.desc: After picking up Gina's earrings, Tommy, Cole and Jerome get robbed.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: 72 Hours
programme.desc: Carlton accepts Will's challenge to survive two days in a tough Los Angeles neighbourhood.

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger
programme.desc: Dre has never had a problem with Pops dating, but when it comes to Ruby, he won't let anyone come between them. When Ruby invites Dre and Bow to meet the new man in her life, Dre immediately goes on the defensive and finds any reason to dislike him.

programme.title: Black-ish: Keeping Up With the Johnsons
programme.desc: After a month of heavy spending, Dre and Bow start to question if they are living too large and try to become more financially responsible.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: After Dre notices that his neighbour Janine has never invited his family to any of her pool parties, he assumes she is racially stereotyping them as a family that doesn't swim. The kids are shocked to find out that, in fact, Dre doesn’t know how to swim.

programme.title: Black-ish: Twindependence
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are tired of being twins, and after much pleading, Dre and Bow give in to letting them explore their lives as individuals. Meanwhile, Dre buys Zoey her first car, and she is over the moon.

programme.title: Black-ish: Hope
programme.desc: When the kids ask some tough questions in the midst of a highly publicized court case involving alleged police brutality and an African-American teenager, Dre and Bow are conflicted on how best to field them.

programme.title: Black-ish: Any Given Saturday
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are doing biography projects about each other in school, and Diane decides to shoot a documentary on Jack's budding basketball career.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Nanny
programme.desc: Dre and Bow start to slip on the kids' activities and chores around the house, so Bow persuades Dre to hire a nanny. After several interviews that don't go well, they meet Vivian, who impresses them with her desire to take care of the whole family.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Leftovers
programme.desc: When Dre and Bow realize they don't have a legal guardian for their kids, they make it their mission to find replacement parents should anything happen to them. Meanwhile, Zoey and Junior reveal the truth to Jack about their old dog's death.

programme.title: Black-ish: Johnson & Johnson
programme.desc: Dre's sister, Rhonda, is getting married to her girlfriend, Sharon, and the upcoming nuptials lead to a conversation on tradition. Dre finds out that Bow is against the patriarchal convention of taking the man's last name.

programme.desc: Will and Carlton spy on Ashley when she goes on her first date with a famous singer.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Working It Out
programme.desc: To keep her new job as an assistant to a movie star, Hilary accepts a date with Jazz.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Did the Earth Move for You?
programme.desc: When an earthquake strikes, strange things happen to the relationships in Will's family.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Mother of All Battles
programme.desc: An all-out war ensues between Ashley's parents and those of a girl who is harassing her.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Will Gets a Job
programme.desc: Will gets a job so he can pay his own way.

programme.desc: A man's search for a good folk song leads him to a mysterious woman.

programme.desc: Warren and the team encounter the sole inhabitant of a strange town, while Murphy begins his new mission.

programme.title: Z Nation: Escorpion and the Red Hand

programme.title: Z Nation: Little Red and the Wolfz

programme.title: Z Nation: Doc Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
programme.desc: The residents of a mental hospital capture Doc in hopes that he'll help them escape.

programme.title: Z Nation: Welcome to Murphytown
programme.desc: Lucy's existence is discovered by 'The Man'; the gang are reunited with 10K, who informs them all about Murphy's growing army of devoted followers.

programme.title: Movie: The Purge
programme.desc: A family is held hostage for harbouring the target of a murderous syndicate during the Purge, a period in which any and all crime is legalized.

programme.title: Movie: Vampire Academy
programme.desc: A teenage human-vampire hybrid trains at a special school to protect the Moroi: a line of peaceful, mortal vampires, of which her best friend is one. Aware of a growing threat within the Academy, the two plan to make their escape.

programme.title: Movie: Jigsaw
programme.desc: Over a decade after the notorious Jigsaw Killer died, murder victims who were all killed in unique and gruesome ways begin turning up around the city, each bearing his distinct mark. For the victims already in the killer's grasp, help may come too late.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Building a New Life Together
programme.desc: Two engaged police officers have been living in a cramped trailer on rural land they have been trying to clear themselves. Brian and Mika take over the heavy equipment and build this couple's dream home so that they can actually plan their wedding!

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home: Dream Home for a Globetrotter
programme.desc: A Harlem Globetrotter is ready to settle down with his girlfriend in their dream home. With their California house rented out and only a short amount of video chatting, Brian and Mika have their work cut out to finish this big-deal build in just 100 days.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Family Memories
programme.desc: A couple asks Jenn to revitalize their outdated family home which contains, among other challenges, the most unusual bathroom she's ever seen. Next, Jenn works with a family whose home has lots of space but no personality to give it the style it deserves.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Dream House Redo
programme.desc: Homeowners who still consider their house of 20 years to be their dream home ask Jenn to give its outdated spaces a major facelift. Next, Jenn works with a couple to create a bedroom suite retreat after years of putting their kids' needs first.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Smelly Time Capsule
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina make a costly decision to open up the floor plan on a stinky 1950s home in Whittier, California. The duo encounter extensive termite and water damage as they try to turn this disgusting and dated house into a modern money maker.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Back House Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a small house in Lakewood, CA, to flip quickly. However, when they discover an unpermitted addition, they are faced with a dilemma of bringing the addition up to code or tearing down the nicest part of the house.

programme.title: House Hunters: Sports, Beaches and LA Dreams
programme.desc: A young family looking to move from Florida to California is searching for the perfect home in the tight Los Angeles market, but their conflicting location and size needs could quickly derail their California dream.

programme.title: House Hunters International: One-Way Dreaming to Tours, France
programme.desc: A couple looks to reconnect with his roots and realize her life-long dream of moving their family to Tours, France. They're looking for a large home with plenty of space, and she wants classic French style, but he prefers something updated and modern.

programme.title: House Hunters: Doing it for My Daughter in Illinois
programme.desc: A cash-strapped single mother looks to buy her first home in Zion, Illinois. She's looking for a home with two bedrooms and a yard for her 11-year-old daughter's dog, but her fear of taking on projects will make it difficult with her small budget.

programme.title: House Hunters International: Family Life in Florence
programme.desc: A family seeks simplicity in Florence, Italy. She wants something in the city center, while he wants a standalone property in the country.

programme.desc: Homeowners who still consider their house of 20 years to be their dream home ask Jenn to give its outdated spaces a major facelift. Next, Jenn works with a couple to create a bedroom suite retreat after years of putting their kids' needs first.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Pipe Dreams
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina come across a For Sale By Owner property in Garden Grove, California. This type of sale is always exciting for a flipper because it means no real estate agent commissions and an opportunity to negotiate a fair sale price.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: A Flip With the Enemy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are busier than ever with their growing business. As a result, when a fellow flipper contacts them about partnering on a house and he wants to split the time, money and profit 50/50, they are very interested.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Too Good to Be True
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a clean house in good shape that is aggressively priced in comparison to comparable properties in the area. But the reality of a dream listing doesn't always live up to the hype so they head over to check out the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Big Lot Little Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina spot a new listing in Buena Park, California that's small and run down but sits on a very large lot, offering possibilities for added value and increased profit.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Two Houses for Sale
programme.desc: Tarek gets a lead on a house in Buena Park, CA, and calls Christina to check it out. When they arrive at the house, they find that it's dated inside and out.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Dark and Dingy
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good flip in Garden, CA, but Christina is worried that Tarek's penny-pinching will prevent them from making the necessary design decisions to maximize profits.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Fantastic Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina take on a home in a trendy Costa Mesa, CA, neighborhood but if they want to give the hip homebuyers what they want, they'll first have to nail the design.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Flea Bag Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a house in Rowland Heights, CA. This three-bedroom, two-bath house should be a quick flip, but once they get inside they find big problems that will take all their skills to fix.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Treasure Hunt
programme.desc: When strange additions and design challenges collide, this quick flip turns out to be harder than anticipated.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Bankrupt Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina find a good deal in a familiar neighbourhood in Anaheim, CA. They need to act fast if they want to lock it in, but they have to make an offer without seeing the inside.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Alarming Flip
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina return to the street of a previous flip in Cypress, CA. When they can't agree on a design for the kitchen, they decide to settle the matter with a quick game of hoops.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Midcentury Money Pit
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Fullerton, California, right across the street from Tarek's first flip. Before renovating, they have to deal with crumbling concrete, and they need to figure out the market for the house.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: It's a Dump
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina flip a house in Lakewood, CA, near one of their previous flips. They hope to repeat their past success, but modernizing an old house comes with a high price tag.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Buyer's Remorse
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a smoking deal on a Yorba Linda, CA, home. They spend big money to remove a fireplace, but when Tarek goes behind Christina's back and changes a tile design, she tackles the new fireplace herself.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Turf Wars
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina team up with their friend Pete De Best on a house in Yorba Linda, CA. They've flipped houses with Pete and have had success, but he's a major penny pincher, and they must convince him that you have to spend money to make money.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Small House, Big Problems
programme.desc: Tarek and contractor Izzy Battres take on a small house in Fullerton, CA. The seemingly easy flip becomes difficult when removing a wall creates a nightmare with the city and an unpermitted laundry room must be moved.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Family Memories

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Glam Guest House
programme.desc: A couple who bought their home eight years ago loved the layout but not the look, so Jenn gives them a Cape Cod-style makeover that works for their entire family. Then, Jenn transforms a plain pool house into a glam guesthouse that's ideal for visitors.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Dark Wood Dilemma
programme.desc: Jenn helps a couple of recent empty nesters who have enjoyed their home for 20 years give its dark interior a complete update. Next, a frequently moving family asks Jenn to turn their latest home into the place where they'll want to stay for a long time.

programme.desc: A look at whether or not the Ancient Aliens that have visited Earth left behind any clues to their existence such as aircraft or complex electrical grids.

programme.title: America's Book of Secrets: Special Edition: The Secret Space Program
programme.desc: In 2002, Gary McKinnon claimed that he had evidence that a secret military space program existed. It's possible that the U.S. has a greater presence in space than publicly known.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Anunnaki Connection
programme.desc: The Sumerians credit their many achievements to The Anunnaki -- giant, winged gods who are only found in ancient cuneiform texts.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and the Lost Ark
programme.desc: The biblical stories surrounding the Ark speak of a device with divine powers that was able to produce food, take down stonewalls, kill those that come in contact with it and provide direct communication with God.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Reptilians
programme.desc: The Reptilian alien is a fixture of science-fiction, but ancient myths about reptilian creatures could provide evidence that they are more than just a pop-culture creation. Legends of serpent beings can be found on every continent.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Genius Factor
programme.desc: Whether it's Albert Einstein's theory of relativity, Edison's light bulb, or Russian chemist Dmitri Mendeleyev's Periodic Table of Elements, geniuses routinely say their best ideas come from dreams, visions, or hallucinated voices.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Hidden Pyramids
programme.desc: Many believe we have entered a new pyramid era with the discovery of hidden pyramids in Egypt and Central America.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Aliens and Robots
programme.desc: In the 21st century, robots are being programmed to do everything from perform surgery on humans to explore other planets. Also, humanoid robots are rapidly reaching a level of sophistication that was thought to exist only in science fiction.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Trap
programme.desc: It was an affluent neighborhood with tree lined streets. Violent crime was unheard of here until that morning when, under the very noses of the cops, a terrible murder occurred. Investigators found a riddle, a deception, a piece of pure evil.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Detour
programme.desc: Diane McIver was a successful businesswoman who enjoyed a lavish lifestyle with her husband. Then she was gone. It was a mystery riddled with privilege and power, but investigators needed to answer a crucial question: was this an accident or murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What They Saw
programme.desc: Detectives believed two young children witnessed the unthinkable, the brutal murder of their mother. The prosecution's case would be built around what they thought those kids observed, but was another version of events possible?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Shining Star
programme.desc: Chiquita Tate was growing her reputation as a tenacious defense attorney but her promising career was cut short when she was murdered. Police had a challenge. At work, she dealt with tough clients, and at home, she was going through a rough time.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Ransom
programme.desc: It began with a young mom abducted at gunpoint. Her family and veteran investigators spent desperate days trying to find out where she was but they never could have guessed who had her and why.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Reckless
programme.desc: This is a story of teens, text messages and a complicated search for the truth. Conrad Roy had vanished. Turns out, he shared a secret with someone close to him. What that confidant did and did not do with the information shattered two families.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Capture
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a journalist braving the world's most dangerous hotspots. Then, she became the story. What she endured from her captors was terrifying. Years later they found her again and secret agents put a daring undercover sting into action.

programme.title: Snapped: Carri Standsoverbull
programme.desc: When a charred human torso is discovered on a Native American reservation in Montana, local and federal investigators join forces to piece together a heinous crime.

programme.desc: When the bodies of two grandparents are tragically found left for dead, investigators toil to determine whether the slayings were motivated by simmering vengeance or insatiable greed.

programme.desc: An investigation into the murder of a small-town bus driver exposes secrets that lurk behind closed doors.

programme.desc: Satellite images reveal a long-lost village buried in a dense forest; archaeologists investigate and uncover a mysterious gravesite with the remains of decapitated skeletons and possible evidence of vampire burials.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunt for Atlantis
programme.desc: New satellite evidence reveals a mysterious spiral structure from space, and experts speculate that it could be the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Hitler's Forbidden Island
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange fortified island reveal the terrifying truth behind Hitler's secret plan to win World War II at all costs, and using the latest science and tech, experts investigate what really happened here.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Devil's Lair
programme.desc: When a top-secret Nazi base is discovered in France decades after the war ends, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal the secrets of this deadly compound; what they find could change everything we know about D-Day and the last stand of the Nazi regime.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Conspiracy on Death Island
programme.desc: A strange, abandoned mansion on a remote island is central to countless conspiracy theories, and new discoveries reveal if this eerie site was a secret Nazi base intended for a sinister mission.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: The Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned eerie structure in France could have doomed the Allies in World War II, and new discoveries at this mysterious site reveal the truth behind top-secret Nazi plans to unleash apocalyptic destruction.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Ruins: Mystery of the Nazi Nukes
programme.desc: When a secret bunker and a vast network of tunnels are discovered after World War II, experts use cutting-edge tech to uncover if the high levels of radiation in the area could be connected to a classified Nazi nuclear program.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Ghost Ship of the Desert
programme.desc: After a huge cargo ship suddenly vanishes with 27 crew members on board, new evidence suggests the culprit may be a mythical rogue wave. Plus, recently discovered evidence may prove the existence of a ghost ship in the Californian desert.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Flight of Terror
programme.desc: In 2009, an Air France flight going missing and investigators discover this tragedy could happen again. After a huge area of Siberian forest is destroyed, investigators race to find the culprit. New evidence might finally solve this century-old mystery.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Atlantis: The Lost Evidence
programme.desc: Atlantis is one of the most famous disappearances of all time. After thousands of years, state-of-the-art technology might finally be able to crack this ancient mystery. And after nine hikers die in a gruesome cold case, new science provides a hot lead.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Forbidden City of Gold
programme.desc: New technology reveals lost cities in inhospitable jungle, and researchers wonder if the mythical city of El Dorado could be the next discovery. After a crystal is found on a shipwreck, experts believe it could prove how the Vikings discovered America.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: The Men Who Beat Alcatraz
programme.desc: In 1962, three convicts attempt the impossible and escape from Alcatraz prison. Officials believe the men drowned, but a new scientific experiment suggests they made it to shore.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Missing: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: After five planes vanish in the Bermuda Triangle, new science suggests a strange geological force is responsible. Today, satellites are revealing lost tribes living in the Amazon jungle, but some civilizations remain missing, stumping experts.

programme.title: Human+: The Future of Our Senses: Touch
programme.desc: We think of touch as resulting in a single sensation, but many thousands of nerve endings work in concert to create it. Managing to give bionic limbs a sense of touch is one of the latest successes of medical technology.

programme.title: Human+: The Future of Our Senses: Sight
programme.desc: The science of sight has entered a new era. We meet a blind rock climber who, using a sensory-substitution device, "sees" via vibrations on his tongue, as well as athletes who are winning with brain-training techniques that improve their visual acuity.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Living a Lie
programme.desc: Bob Peterson invites himself to his co-workers Gene and Jaye-Jaye Thurnau's new home to give them a housewarming present. That evening, Jaye-Jaye leaves the guys to run an errand.

programme.title: Suspicious Minds: Who Killed the Councilman?
programme.desc: Matt Garcia, a popular young city councilman, is shot dead in Fairfield, California. Politicians and an anxious public demand answers. Drug dealers, political rivals, and even Matt's own father fall under suspicion.

programme.title: Diabolical: Sins of a Mother
programme.desc: In 1994, Lake Orion, Michigan is rocked by a vicious murder. At first, the crime is a mystery. But in a small town where everyone knows each other, rumors start flying. Soon, police expose a strange and twisted plot that no one saw coming.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Who Killed Anna?
programme.desc: A 42-year-old Russian woman living the American dream in Texas is savagely gunned down in her garage. As investigators work the case, the list of suspects includes her controlling ex-husband, her boyfriend, an obsessive admirer, and a generous mentor.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Old Friends, Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: What starts as an idyllic relationship between neighbouring best friends and business partners takes a wrong turn and ends up in threats, restraining orders, litigation, and ultimately a triple homicide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Lived A Double Life
programme.desc: Sonja Holt begins to suspect that her fiancé, Stafford Shaw, is living a secret double life. She can't imagine just how far he will go to keep everyone from finding out the truth about him or the terrible price that will be paid when his secrets collide.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Who Killed Anna?
programme.desc: A 42-year-old Russian woman living the American dream in Texas is savagely gunned down in her garage. As investigators work the case, the list of suspects includes her controlling ex-husband, her boyfriend, an obsessive admirer, and a generous mentor.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Old Friends, Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: What starts as an idyllic relationship between neighbouring best friends and business partners takes a wrong turn and ends up in threats, restraining orders, litigation, and ultimately a triple homicide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Werewolf Butcher
programme.desc: When Jack 'Roy' Spillman started collecting wolf memorabilia, his sisters thought it was just an odd hobby. But when they learned of horrific things he had done, they realized some people may have been right when they called him 'more animal than human.'

programme.title: Diabolical: Killer Track Record
programme.desc: Three women die of the same mysterious illness, the hunt is on to prove their deaths are no accident. Investigators don't know that they are being played for fools by a sinister killer lurking undetected. There's only one woman who can bring him down.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Murder at the Drama Club
programme.desc: Deep in Louisiana bayou country, a man is found brutally murdered in a nightclub. A handwritten note soaked in the victim's blood reads: 'You gave me AIDS.' Police have more questions than answers. Was it a hate crime? Will the killer strike again?

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: An Inconvenient Murder
programme.desc: It is her Hollywood dream come true. A woman is in entangled with a brooding leading man and the son of a world-famous actor. After she is shot to death, investigators search for her killer.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: A Family Plot
programme.desc: Members of a Midwestern suburban family begin mysteriously dying off after weeks of flu-like symptoms. But after a third family member is hospitalized, authorities begin to believe something far more sinister is at work.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Where Is Baby DeOrr?
programme.desc: A young couple enjoys an impromptu camping trip in Leadore, Idaho, until their 2-year-old son suddenly vanishes. Investigators and private detectives work around the clock to find the missing boy, only to point the finger back at the parents.

programme.title: Truth About Murder With Sunny Hostin: Death Ride
programme.desc: A young mother's lifeless body is found floating deep in the Louisiana bayou and local police are stumped as to how she wound up dead nearly 300 miles from her Texas home. There is little physical evidence, and there are no eye-witnesses.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Raise the Dead
programme.desc: When 71-year-old Orville Head passes away, no one questions the death of an elderly man with health problems. But when a tip comes in suggesting foul play, Lt. Joe Kenda is left with only one way to reveal the truth: exhume the body from its grave.

programme.title: Disappeared: Gone In An Instant: Dangerous Liaisons
Disappeared: Into the Night
programme.desc: After a night at home watching movies, 18-year-old Zoe Campos cannot be found by her family the next morning. As investigators pore through the teen's Facebook account, they discover she did not turn in early as her loved ones originally thought.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: ABC News Correspondent Linzie Janis speaks exclusively to Nathan Carman about his rescue from the ill-fated fishing trip that claimed his mother Linda's life.

programme.title: My Family's Deadly Secret: Who Killed Cathy?
programme.desc: When 20-year-old student Cathy Torrez is discovered dead in the trunk of her own car, her family won't rest until her killer is bought to justice. After breakthroughs in forensic technology years later, the truth behind who killed Cathy is revealed.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: The Lies that Bind: Cult of Personality
programme.desc: In 2014 a 911 call reports gunshots at the home of TV host Scott Rogers. As detectives work to piece together the events that led up to what looks like a murder-suicide, they soon discover a trail of lies from England all the way to Louisiana.

programme.title: Valley of the Damned: The Second Shot
programme.desc: When Dianne Hood is gunned down outside a community center in Prison Valley, no one can understand why anyone would want to murder the well-liked housewife. The answer involves betrayal, greed and obsession, in an infamous love-triangle murder plot.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: How the World Ends: Alien Invasion
programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Icons of Freedom
programme.desc: Discover the secrets behind some of America's biggest icons.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Crooks
programme.desc: We all know of the 9/11 terrorist attack on NYC, the Boy Scouts and Coca-Cola and have heard the name DB Cooper. Learn the secrets behind some of America's biggest crooks, schemes and scandals.

programme.title: What History Forgot: To the Ends of the World
programme.desc: Delve into the unknown stories behind some of the biggest disasters, threats and conquests in America's skies. From the attack on Pearl Harbor, the Hindenburg disaster, Apollo 13 and the race to the Moon.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Secret Weapons
programme.desc: Discover the unknown stories of some of the incredible plots, ploys and people behind America's secret weapons during the Cold War, the Vietnam War, and WWII.

programme.title: What History Forgot: Crooks
programme.desc: We all know of the 9/11 terrorist attack on NYC, the Boy Scouts and Coca-Cola and have heard the name DB Cooper. Learn the secrets behind some of America's biggest crooks, schemes and scandals.

programme.desc: With the recent discovery of thousands of earth-like planets in the universe the search for intelligent alien life continues. Some astronomers warn, when we find it, we should be prepared for advanced hostile extra-terrestrial species capable of anything.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Hitler: The Benchmark of Terror
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler murders six million Jews and invades peaceful countries brutally killing anyone in his way. Find out what could turn a high school dropout into the most evil dictator the world has ever seen.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Hunt for Che Guevara
programme.desc: Che Guevara is intent on destroying the U.S. The CIA sends agent, Felix Rodriguez, to Bolivia to bring him back alive. Based on new documents we now reveal the true story of this secret CIA mission to hunt down the world's most famous revolutionary.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Beirut Bomb
programme.desc: The true story of how CIA Director William Casey allegedly sanctioned an off-the-books assassination attempt on Sheikh Mohammed Fadlallah in Beirut in 1985. Casey was convinced Fadlallah was the head of Hezbollah and behind a series of terrorist attacks.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The KKK
programme.desc: We delve into the world of the most notorious white supremacist group in America, the KKK. Once having over a million members, today it's just a shadow of its former self. We meet real members and look at the impact of the group has had on America.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Brotherhood of the Blood
programme.desc: Sworn to protect and preserve the Holy Blood of Christ, the Brotherhood of the Blood are a dark and mysterious sect. We go on a quest to shed light on a group shrouded in secrecy through the ages, revealing the extreme methods the Brotherhood used.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: Nazi Occult Societies
programme.desc: We uncover what lies behind the history of the overwhelming military power of the Nazis: their strong belief in ancient mysticism, the occult, and even alien contact which fuelled their desire to rule as a genetically pure super-race.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: The Pope's Bodyguards
programme.desc: From stone-age Hawaii to 16th-century Japan, from Ancient Greece to the Byzantine Empire, there have always been elite Special Forces.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Kung Fu Nun
programme.desc: 1644. Ng Mui escapes from Beijing. Taking refuge in a Shaolin monastery, she learns their Kung Fu and develops a new form of the martial art.

programme.desc: A family that had to delay pool plans after building a new home is finally ready to make their backyard vision a reality.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Clean and Classic in Corona
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Corona, California, to help a big extended family that's running low on living space. They design a clean, geometrical pool with an artistic fountain wall, fire features and a killer barbecue area for everyone to enjoy.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Heaven
programme.desc: After years of clearing and construction, Rene and Kelly are finally ready to put in a pool that completes their beautiful, 20-acre San Antonio property. Tony and Paul include a huge natural waterfall, stacked-stone spa and Baja shelf.

programme.title: Pool Kings: This Pool Goes Up
programme.desc: A young family in a new house is hoping for some help upgrading their backyard in the form of a top-notch swimming pool. The pool of their dreams has a waterfall, a customized spa and a fire feature that accentuates their beautiful Texas view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Desert Oasis in Sin City
programme.desc: Mike Baldasare and Jim Bellamy, two best friends that build award winning pools for clients all across the southwest, head to Las Vegas to build a dream pool for Shane and Willow Jager's brand new dream home.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Game Time
programme.desc: After dealing with hot summers and limited options for swimming, a Tennessee father has decided it's time to get a pool of his own. The Pool Kings are up for the task and create a sports pool that will provide endless entertainment.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Backyard or Water Park?
programme.desc: Why go on vacation when you have your own resort-worthy pool right in your own backyard?

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Roanoke Chamber Of Commerce
programme.desc: The Dawgs save pieces from the Roanoke Chamber of Commerce, including safe deposit boxes and a pneumatic messaging system. The team also works on a large bar commissioned for the Natural Bridge Hotel.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Mega Decks: A Deck Fit For Fun
programme.desc: A couple's home in Parker, Colorado, needs a major deck overhaul to take advantage of the incredible views of the Rocky Mountains and downtown Denver. A huge budget allows the Mega Decks crew to design deck like no other.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Side-by-side Penthouse Decks
programme.desc: The crew is faced with the most difficult task to date, delivering side-by-side penthouse decks to neighboring couples in a historic Denver, Colorado, high-rise. The finished product includes indoor/ outdoor rooms, grills, and hot tubs.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Masterpiece
programme.desc: A mountain home in Conifer, Colorado, gets a $375K deck with a wall-sized stone fireplace, a hot tub that seats 12 and a grill kitchen. Jason's team is pitted against Mother Nature, however, when an icy road leads to a delivery truck crash.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Snake River Showpiece
programme.desc: Garth and his team brave sub-freezing temperatures in Idaho to build a $590k multi-level deck with four distinct living areas. The indoor-outdoor space features a pizza oven, a mezzanine-level bar overlooking the Snake River and an infrared sauna.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Mountain Majesty Retreat
programme.desc: A Texas family transforms the existing deck of their vacation home into a luxurious mega deck. It features a gable roof with a skylight outside. Inside, a rustic great room gets natural log siding and a floor to ceiling fireplace with custom masonry.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Colorado Contemporary Deck
programme.desc: The crew has a $350,000 budget for a contemporary-style mega deck with a curved hand-cut stone fireplace, a pergola and a pizza oven. Building outdoors in winter subjects the crew to dangerous icy conditions and an oversight threatens the pergola build.

programme.title: Mega Decks: All-New Deck for Repeat Client
programme.desc: A former Mega Decks customer buys a new house and needs a new deck. Find out if Andy and the build crew can live up to the client's heightened expectations and deliver a second mega deck that beats the first.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Dramatic Cliffside Triple Deck
programme.desc: Transforming this home's 20 year old deck into a mega deck requires a complete demo and rebuild. Plans include redoing a kids' play deck and a master bedroom deck. The challenge is that the property sits on the side of a cliff with a 40 foot drop.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Log Cabin Luxe
programme.desc: To help this tiny deck achieve mega status, massive 40-foot-long Western red cedar logs are trucked in from Canada. The finished product has a three-tier pizza oven, a six-foot gas fire rail, and extra tall glass panels.

programme.title: Mega Decks: Ultimate Party Deck
programme.desc: A couple in Colorado dislike their home's small, exposed deck that leaves guests crowded. Garth designs a deck that opens up the walls, triples the original deck footprint, and adds a fireplace and TV to create the ultimate party space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Renovation in South Florida
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach home to renovate on a budget in South Florida.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Beachfront or Bust in Myrtle Beach
programme.desc: Brad grew up spending summers in North Myrtle Beach, South Carolina. Now he's ready to find a vacation home for his family, and local broker Jason Moore is just the man to help them find it, along with some help from his wife and kids.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Backyard Beachside Blowout in Emerald Isle, North Carolina
programme.desc: After years of visiting Emerald Isle, North Carolina, with their three kids, Matt and Megann are ready to buy a weekend getaway home at the beach. After finding a fixer-upper in their budget, they have $50,000 to create a luxurious outdoor space.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Full-on Fixer-Upper in St. Pete Beach, Florida
programme.desc: Steve and Stacie just moved to St. Pete Beach, Florida, and are looking to put down some roots. They find their perfect beachside home but it needs a ton of work.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Crystal Beach, Here We Come!
programme.desc: A young couple's new vacation home in Crystal Beach, Texas, requires a full gut, including a new kitchen, new bathrooms and a master suite. As walls are opened and floors are torn up, they realize their budget might not cover everything.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Bay Area
programme.desc: San Francisco proves that barbeque is not strictly southern, with the pork bun at Yank Sing.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Big Cheese
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro, Geoffrey Zakarian, Jamika Pessoa and Bobby Flay are just a few of your favorite food personalities sharing their all-time favourite ways to indulge in some cheesy goodness.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Seattle
programme.desc: In Seattle, the crab cakes are so good it's an obsession, and you can find a seriously good slice of pizza at Serious Pie.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Mexican Favorites
programme.desc: We're saluting magnificent Mexican food from all around the country starting with Alton Brown's favorite homemade salsa in Columbus, Ohio. Ali Khan then serves up a true Mexican original with beef carnitas tacos in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charlotte
programme.desc: Andrew explores Charlotte, NC, a city where big banking meets blue-collar traditions and is buzzing with amazing food. He zeroes in on barbecue, livermush, fried green tomatoes and other eats that are oozing Southern charm.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Kyoto
programme.desc: Andrew explores the elaborate feasts, home-cooked comfort food, sushi and confections of Kyoto, Japan. From the artistic multi-course dining experience to the everyday humble comfort foods.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chesapeake Bay
programme.desc: Andrew tastes his way through the Chesapeake Bay area, trying creamy peanut soup and more.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Seattle
programme.desc: Andrew visits Seattle where the food scene is a contrast of high tech sophistication and rugged simplicity.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Houston: Blast and Cast
programme.desc: Andrew gets a taste of Texas-sized personality when he visits the vibrant city of Houston.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Are You Grillin' Me?
programme.desc: Major skills and big personalities surface in the Wildfire Round. The competitors show the judges the honey in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire celebrates Brazil and a churrasco feast.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Austin, Texas
programme.desc: Casey Webb's appetizing trek across America brings him to Austin, TX. He starts with a 2-pound barbecue behemoth packed with every meat, sauce and side on the menu.

programme.title: Man v. Food: St. Louis, MO
programme.desc: Casey Webb visits St. Louis, Missouri, in search of the biggest and best the city has to offer. He encounters a four-pound meatball and tackles a New York-style pizza so massive he'll need the help of a partner to take it down.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chicago: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a bite of Chicago's humble, hearty and world-renowned food scene. From juicy rib tips to zesty Polish sausages to experimental and edible works of art, Chicago's eats stay true to its roots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Ozarks
programme.desc: Andrew visits the Ozarks where hunting and fishing are still a central way of life.

programme.title: Fire Masters: Are You Grillin' Me?
programme.desc: Major skills and big personalities surface in the Wildfire Round. The competitors show the judges the honey in the Crossfire Round, and the Feast of Fire celebrates Brazil and a churrasco feast.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Wilmington, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary adventures take him to the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina, for a barbecue bonanza, a totally bonkers burrito and a big, bad behemoth in the undefeated Pierogi Team Challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Seattle, Washington
programme.desc: Casey travels to Seattle where he climbs a Mount Fuji-sized burger and takes on seven terrifyingly spicy Buffalo wings that have defeated over 5,000 challengers.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Two Rode Together

programme.title: The Golden Girls: You Gotta Have Hope

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Till Death Do We Volley

programme.title: The Golden Girls: High Anxiety

programme.title: The Office: Free Family Portrait Studio

programme.title: The Office: Roy's Wedding

programme.title: The Office: Andy's Ancestry

programme.title: The Office: Work Bus

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Don't Worry It's His Sister
programme.desc: Johnny tries to get a potentially offensive town sign taken down. Meanwhile, David is faced with the frightening task of find a job.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Bad Parents
programme.desc: Johnny and Moira, feeling like they have failed as parents, try to get to know their grown children. Alexis spies on Mutt and things he's having an affair with the Mayor's wife.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: The Cabin
programme.desc: Looking for privacy, Johnny and Moira take the Mayor up on his offer of using his cabin for a night. Alexis and David use the opportunity to throw a party.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek: Wine and Roses
programme.desc: Moira is hired as the spokesperson for a local winery. Meanwhile, Alexis gets a little too close to Mutt while David struggles with a mysterious health problem.

programme.title: Tiffany Haddish: She Ready! From the Hood to Hollywood!

programme.title: South Park: The Succubus
programme.desc: Chef's parents arrive in South Park from Scotland fresh from an encounter with the Loch Ness Monster to attend Chef's wedding. However, the boys believe Chef's bride-to-be is a succubus, and they try to stop the wedding.

programme.title: South Park: Pee

programme.title: South Park: Professor Chaos
programme.desc: When the boys fire Butters as their new friend, devastation over his rejection unleashes his dark side and the super villain Professor Chaos is born.

programme.title: South Park: Simpsons Already Did It
programme.desc: Professor Chaos is frustrated when he realizes all of his diabolical plans to wreak havoc on South Park have already been done by 'The Simpsons.' Meanwhile, Cartman and the boys try to retrieve their sea-men from Ms. Choksondik's stomach.
