programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Soulmate
programme.desc: A woman who seemingly has it all secretly endures abuse at the hands of her controlling husband. Seeking to escape her marriage, she finds friendship with a fan of her writing, but soon realizes this relationship may be more dangerous than her marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped Model
programme.desc: An aspiring model is held hostage by a fashion photographer and forced to star on his sexy website.

programme.title: Movie: Trapped Sisters
programme.desc: Sisters Bree and Jonna get trapped beneath the fiberglass cover of an Olympic sized public pool after it closes for the holiday weekend. They find themselves at the mercy of the night janitor, Clara, who sees them as a solution to her own problems.

programme.title: Movie: Burning Little Lies
programme.desc: A woman falls for a handsome firefighter after he rescues her from a suspicious car crash. But her life spins into a deadly affair after his seemingly overprotective behavior burns through her life.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Ambush
programme.desc: A mysterious murder in an upscale community is solved by cell phone forensics.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Portrait of a Serial Killer
programme.desc: A serial killer terrorizes a small Texas town.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A fire leads investigators to re-examine an unusual death.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Green Pen
programme.desc: When a Yale student mysteriously vanishes days before her wedding investigators comb a secure research lab for clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: Killer Snapshot
programme.desc: An amazing new forensic tool turns a cold case around.

programme.title: Forensic Files II: The Black Hole
programme.desc: Investigators search for clues after a body is discovered in a watery grave.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: In a quiet village in Great Britain, a farmer came upon a chilling sight. Impaled on his fence post was a severed lamb’s head along with a note which read, 'You next.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fatal Fungus
programme.desc: In Cleveland, more than thirty cases of people suffering from bleeding lungs were reported in the span of a few months. Doctors had never seen anything like it, and searched frantically for the cause and a cure.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Office Visit
programme.desc: "The Dr. Brian Stidham Case" A prominent Arizona surgeon is found stabbed to death outside his office. All signs point to a random attack until investigators uncover an unlikely suspect with deep pockets, and an even deeper hatred for the good doctor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shoe-In for Murder
programme.desc: A 12 year-old is the only witness to her mother's death and is unable to provide many details. Over a decade later, forensic evidence has lead the investigation right back to where it started.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing
programme.desc: A high-priced call girl is murdered on the outskirts of Columbia, SC, and find that a six-pack of beer may be their only link to the person responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Runaway Love
programme.desc: A woman is found floating in the harbor of an upscale yacht club, stabbed more than 50 times, and her ex-husband and daughter are missing. Investigators turn to forensic science to determine if they’re searching for victims... or perpetrators.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Watchful Eye
programme.desc: 'The Carrie Nelson Case' - The brutal murder of a State Park employee rattles tourists and fellow employees alike. Murdered for just $2,000, police sift through several hundred leads to find a killer so merciless.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Threatening emails, a missing person and an abandoned truck lead police to a home where they believe a murder was committed. The evidence is overwhelming and investigators are sure they have the killer. What they don't have is the body of the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The Kristine Fitzhugh Case - A woman is found dead in her home and it seems like an accidental fall down the stairs is to blame. When a pathologist discovers the death was no accident, police suspect it may have been a burglary gone wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Even though the victim was burned beyond recognition, police were able to create a composite sketch from his remains and identify him. Investigators still had to determine where he was killed, however, and who wanted him dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair Line
programme.desc: Doctors don't know why the young scientist is gravely ill. When tests finally reveal the cause, it's too late to save him. Police hope that lab analysis of his hair - showing when attempts were made on his life and what was used - will lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Feet
programme.desc: A woman is abducted from her late-night job at a Florida convenience store. After she is found raped and strangled, investigators know the only way to pin down her killer will be through DNA analysis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: 'The Tracey Frame Case' - after a passer-by spots a wild fire in a secluded parking lot, police discover a dreadful homicide. It takes days to identify the victim, and most of the evidence is lost when firefighters extinguish the blaze.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: John Lennon Assassination
programme.desc: In 1980, the entire world was stunned by the murder of John Lennon. Was Mark Chapman a cold-blooded killer or a seriously deranged young man? We will backtrack through the lives of both men to set the scene through interviews and footage.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Reagan Assassination Attempt
programme.desc: In 1981, a gunman fires six shots at Ronald Reagan. What follows is a chaotic rush to save Reagan's life, confusion at the White House, and an urgent investigation to find out if this is a wider plot, or the work of a lone assassin.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: D.C. Snipers
programme.desc: In 2002, a sniper terrorizes Washington D.C. and the surrounding suburbs, randomly targeting ordinary citizens. Ten are killed, three wounded.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Unabomber

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: The Siege at Waco
programme.desc: The siege at the Branch Davidian compound in Waco, Texas leads to 80 deaths, and the debacle captures America's attention and changes the ATF and the FBI.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dynamic Trio

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Good Man Down

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Enter the Promised Land
programme.desc: The team finally gains access to the potential motherlode in the Hummocks. But as soon as the crew begins, Box Creek is hit by a huge snow storm and Jason makes an alarming discovery.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Papa's Got a Brand New Dredge

programme.desc: Alaskan dredgers brave the frigid Bering Sea hoping to strike gold. They risk their lives and their livelihoods as they dive to the sea floor and suck up gold with their makeshift hose pumps.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire
programme.desc: Harry is selected as Hogwarts' representative in the Tri-Wizard Tournament. But between the stresses of school and the aching of his mysterious scar, he doesn't realize the forces of evil are plotting and he's a part of it.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away
programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Wings, Dogs and Claws
programme.desc: Guy checks out the best homemade cooking in the country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Farm to Table
programme.desc: Guy explores restaurants that serve literally from the farm and the ocean to the table.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Slammin' Sammies
programme.desc: Guy hits up hot eateries around the nation; visiting in Virginia Beach and San Antonio.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Little Twisted
programme.desc: Guy sets out to try the unexpected, be it an old fast food joint in New York with secret Italian family recipes or a Japanese grill/ dinner in California.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Peppers, Pork and Poutine
programme.desc: This trip, triple "D" goes triple "P" with some standout veggie and meat dishes. In Phoenix, the tattooed, trained chef is putting her spin on chilies and a regional pork dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Name That Kitchen
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out some righteous spots that say a lot in the name. In Fort Collins, Colo., an NFL pro and Triple-D alum team up on gangster green chili and mile-high burgers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Arizona All-Stars
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's headin' Southwest for a flavor-filled tour of Scottsdale, Arizona. First, the real deal Italian market making an authentic beef specialty straight from the mother country.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: New Faces and Old Places
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out a mix of familiar places and new faces. In Miami, Guy and a couple buddies hit up a Haitian place for the first time, and the fried pork and pikliz do not disappoint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pretzels, Pork and Paella
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's digging into everything from pretzels to paella. In Bozeman, Mont., a five-star take on breakfast with a Mexican pork masterpiece and a French toast Monte Cristo.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Meaty Mashup
programme.desc: In Little Rock, Ark., an old gas station-turned-eatery is pumpin' bison into a burrito and pilin' pork onto cornmeal waffles. In Santa Rosa, CA, a Vietnamese joint makes phenomenal pho and righteous barbecue pork.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions
programme.desc: This trip, Guy gets the lowdown on some longstanding traditions. In Philadelphia, the Jamaican joint going all out authentic with the jerk chicken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far Out
programme.desc: Guy hones in on spots that are doing it different in Syracuse and in Hoboken.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Crankin' Up the Classics
programme.desc: In Minneapolis, an Italian deli serves pizza and pasta. In Dallas, the menu includes gumbo and burgers with brisket.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like A Pro: Salads For Four Seasons
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing her pro tips for sensational salads for every season. For an all-in-one spring dinner, her crispy mustard chicken and frisee salad is unbeatable, and tarragon shrimp salad is perfect for an easy and delicious summer lunch.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Seafood
programme.desc: Ina Garten is sharing all her seafood secrets and pro tips, starting with her recipe for Cioppino, a satisfying one-pot stew with cod, shrimp, scallops and mussels.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Get Out and Cook
programme.desc: It's time for fresh air and fresh flavors with Jeff Mauro's grilled spinach and artichoke stuffed chicken and Sunny Anderson's Migas Verde. Geoffrey Zakarian shares a recipe for grilled asparagus that uses only five ingredients.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Comfort Classics and Fruity Cocktails
programme.desc: Proving you can make any dish outside on a grill, Michael prepares a rich mac and cheese loaded with smoked ham with cream cheese, gouda and pecorino. He finishes off with a grilled apple crisp over their fire pit.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: All Greek to Me
programme.desc: It's a burger gift from the Greek gods. Michael Symon's Greek heritage is on full display as he makes a grilled Lamb Burger with Tzatziki. His wife, Liz, concocts an Ouzo Spritz with pickled watermelon rind that pairs perfectly with Michael's burger.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Tale of Four Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is dishing up a tasty tale of four dinners: sticky soy salmon with broccolini and lime rice, better-than-fast-food fancy fish and zucchini fries, creamy gnocchi with chorizo and peppers and make-ahead bacon-wrapped pork tenderloin.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cowboys Who Lunch
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is delivering a tailgate lunch to her husband, Ladd, and the cowboys who are out working cattle. She makes Pressure Cooker Pulled Pork Sandwiches and Pickled Jalapenos and Onions for topping them.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Best Brunch Ever
programme.desc: Jeff Mauro has lovingly compiled his go-to brunch favorites. He revisits the other hosts' recipes and creates a corned beef hash brown muffuletta that's to die for! Katie Lee Biegel fires up a smoked salmon breakfast pizza.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out: Ultimate Comfort Food
programme.desc: Michael Symon loves celery, so he's using it in multiple ways in his comfort food menu. He braises it with other vegetables in his pot roast, which he serves over celery root puree, and he tops the whole thing with celery salsa verde.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Favorite Sunday Suppers
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his chef friends make their lazy-day favorites. Eric Greenspan cooks chicken schnitzel, Antonia Lofaso makes seafood fra diavolo, Marc Murphy bakes his four-cheese spaghetti, and Crista Luedtke shares her classic boon brussels sprouts.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 1
programme.desc: Sixteen young chefs-in-training will compete to see who can become the Chopped Teen Tournament Grand Champion and score the $25,000 prize! In this first preliminary battle, the young competitors must make appetizers from a strange hybrid snack.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 2
programme.desc: Four new formidable young competitors fight to get to the finale, but in the first round, nerves and indecision keep everybody guessing whether all the teen chefs will finish their sausage appetizers.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 3
programme.desc: In the third of four preliminary competitions, a new group of teen chefs arrives in the Chopped Kitchen with tons of energy, which they put to good use cooking short rib appetizers. An already-cooked, artificially coloured ingredient appears.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Battle 4
programme.desc: Four more teen chefs battle it out for the last spot in the $25,000 finale. A can of something strange and a bottle of something sour are two of the ingredients in the appetizer round.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Better Camera

programme.title: The King of Queens: Wedding Presence
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to come up with a way out of attending their friend's wedding.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Hi-Def Jam
programme.desc: Doug and Deacon will stop at nothing to watch the Super Bowl on HDTV.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Paint Misbehavin
programme.desc: Deacon has a paintball birthday party; Carrie tells Doug she finds Deacon attractive.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Deacon Blues
programme.desc: Doug is surprised to find his married best friend, Deacon, out with another woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Horizontal Hold
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug ban sex for two weeks, forcing them to resolve their conflicts verbally.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Dance Party USA
programme.desc: Thinking Pop's luck can rub off on him, Adam gambles at school and loses his toys as a result. Beverly replaces them but Adam knows better. He also learns something new about Pops that allows Adam to accept his grandfather for who he is.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Bill/ Murray
programme.desc: As Erica works on her application to Julliard, Adam and Beverly think she needs to do something big to stand out, so they decide to create a music video starring Erica. However, the music video does not go as Adam planned.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: One and a Half Men
programme.desc: Christine tries to take charge of her hormones when her gynaecologist suggests that she may be experiencing pre-menopause.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: A Decent Proposal
programme.desc: Christine proposes to save her best friend, Barb, from being deported to the Bahamas, by marrying her. Meanwhile, Richard attempts proposing marriage to New Christine.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: How I Hate Your Mother
programme.desc: Richard asks Christine to return her wedding ring, previously his mother's, so he can use it to propose to New Christine.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: White Like Me
programme.desc: Barb's profile in a business journal brings in new clientele.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Snakes on a Date
programme.desc: Christine agrees to go on a date with a children's entertainer specializing in reptile parties in order to get Ritchie into the Reptile Club.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Everyone Says I Love You Except Ritchie
programme.desc: When Ritchie stops telling Christine he loves her, she asks Richard to have a baby with her so she can have a new child to love her, the way Ritchie once did.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Tie Me Up, Don't Tie Me Down
programme.desc: Barb and Christine prepare for a casual, non-relationship-seeking double date, but jealousy arises when one date goes better than the other.

programme.title: Roseanne: Follow the Son
programme.desc: D.J. is growing up, and Roseanne is having trouble loosening the apron strings. Meanwhile, David is stunned to find that Darlene's planning to move in with her new boyfriend, Jimmy.

programme.title: Roseanne: Punch and Jimmy
programme.desc: After D.J. gets pushed around by the town bully, Dan steps in to teach him the basics of self-defense. Recently dumped by Darlene, David begins overcompensating by acting 'macho'.

programme.title: Roseanne: White Men Can't Kiss
programme.desc: When DJ refuses to kiss a black girl in the school play, Dan broods over the source of DJ's racist attitudes. To everyone's surprise, Fred develops a close friendship with his mother-in-law, Bev.

programme.title: Roseanne: Thanksgiving '94
programme.desc: Nana Mary's introduces her new husband at Thanksgiving.. Roseanne and Dan anxiously await the results from her prenatal test and learn that something may be wrong with the baby.

programme.title: Roseanne: Maybe Baby
programme.desc: Waiting for the prenatal test results leave Roseanne and Dan in a panic. Emotions run high as Roseanne mulls over her pregnancy options and consequently excludes Dan from any paternal involvement.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Parenting Trap
programme.desc: DJ's poor performance in school requires him to take 'special' classes. Dan feels he is being shut out as a parent. Darlene learns something about David and his new girlfriend's relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Rear Window
programme.desc: A geriatric couple with a penchant for nudity has moved in next door. Darlene worries about how close Becky and David have gotten.

programme.title: Roseanne: My Name Is Bev
programme.desc: After being arrested for drinking and driving, Bev announces that she is an alcoholic. Roseanne fears that Bev may be lying to mitigate the repercussions.

programme.title: Roseanne: Bed and Bored
programme.desc: Feigning illness for preferential treatment, Roseanne claims the doctor has ordered a week of bed rest. However, her grand scheme quickly turns stale when she finds herself bedridden and bored. Jackie and Bev come to blows.

programme.title: Roseanne: Sisters
programme.desc: Fred's unhappy that DJ's spending all his spare time at Jackie's house. Becky and Darlene find common ground.

programme.title: Roseanne: Lost Youth
programme.desc: Jackie finds her love life with Fred to be predictable. Mark is jealous of David's academic success and takes it out on his new relationship.

programme.title: Roseanne: Single Married Female
programme.desc: After discovering Jackie cavorting with another man, Dan makes the difficult decision to tell Fred. Ironically, Jackie realizes her wrongdoing in time to catch Fred moving out of the house.

programme.title: Roseanne: Husbands and Wives
programme.desc: Roseanne is up to her usual schemes. First, she cons Darlene out of a portion of her monthly allowance. Then, she plots to reunite Fred and Jackie. There's one glitch - Jackie's not sure she wants Fred back!

programme.title: Roseanne: Happy Trailers
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan secretly attempt to help Becky and Mark with money after they move into a shabby trailer. A further case for concern is the couple's boozy trailer-park neighbor, Sharon.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Blaming of the Shrew
programme.desc: D.J.'s first date is with a domineering young girl to a school dance, which Jackie suggests reflects Dan and Roseanne's marriage. Meanwhile, Fred and Jackie go to therapy to work out their marital problems.

programme.title: Roseanne: The Birds and the Frozen Bees
programme.desc: When D.J. reveals that he can bring frozen bees back to life, Jackie decides to conduct a few experiments of her own. Also, Darlene realizes that she's never stopped loving David.

programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade returns to the remote rivers of India's Himalayas to investigate a fresh spate of savage attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters: Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Paran River in the remote corner of Argentina to investigate the death of a young girl. This creature is not armed with bone crunching jaws or razor sharp teeth, but a razor-sharp blade tipped with tissue destroying venom.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into the heart of Central America in search of a man-sized killer. The creature is said to leap into boats, causing fatal injuries when it knocks fishermen unconscious and smashes their bones.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deadliest Man-Eaters: Monster Adversaries
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade's pursuit of the famous Loch Ness monster takes him from the bottom of Loch Ness to the volcanoes of Iceland. Then, in Bolivia, he investigates the disturbing case of a flesh-eating beast that literally tore a man's face off.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: River Monsters: Malaysian Lake Monster
programme.desc: After two men vanish from a remote lake in Malaysia, Jeremy Wade sets out to track down the possible culprit. A trail of evidence leads Jeremy into an ancient rainforest, where an old adversary lies in wait.

programme.title: The Zoo: Birds and the Bees
programme.desc: Leo, a snow leopard rescued from Pakistan, is having trouble eating because of a broken canine. The bird department works feverishly to restore a beehive for the bee-eater birds. Ambassador Center staff work with an adorable fennec fox named Charlie.

programme.title: The Zoo: Walk on the Wild Side
programme.desc: The future of the American bison depends on a high-stakes race across the country. The reptile staff have their hands full with a diamond rattlesnake that needs to be medicated orally. A pair of cheetahs is trained to walk the grounds of the zoo.

programme.title: The Zoo: Love Shack
programme.desc: To help love bloom between two kiwis, zoo staff build an elaborate hut into which they introduce a pair of potential mates. When a king cobra arrives at the zoo, keepers have their hands full training him to move from the exhibit to a holding pen.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: The Zoo: An Elephant's Trust
programme.desc: Trust and experience are put to the test when an elephant requires delicate veterinary treatment from her keepers. Endangered pink pigeons need all the help they can get to produce offspring. Monty the adorable otter needs to visit the dentist.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Tiger's Dance
programme.desc: When keepers introduce two tigers as potential mates, the process proves bumpy. A pair of African porcupines arrive at the zoo, requiring delicate handling. And a pregnancy check on a 3,000 pound rhino necessitates some highly specialized equipment.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Gorilla with Heart
programme.desc: Surgery on a silverback gorilla's broken canine reveals a more serious medical issue. Love may be in the air for two birds of paradise, Glory and Holiday. And, dozens of venomous tarantulas keep the staff on their toes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Tia and Country Matt team up to rescue a reportedly aggressive dog. When a local student wants to adopt a dog that can join her on runs, Earl joins in the training regimen. And, parolee Jammall oversees the care of a dog with serious health issues.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Dogs in the City
programme.desc: Villalobos is invited to participate in Dog Bowl, creating a chance for a handful of dogs to steal the spotlight. M2 helps a neglected dog left in horrible conditions. And a couple takes the first step towards becoming parents - adopting a Villalobos dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Last of the Mobsters
programme.desc: Tia and her kids race to rescue a stray dog near a dangerous, busy highway. An adoption requires some temperament testing in an 18-wheel truck when a trucker wants to adopt a dog to join him on the road. And, a return adopter seeks out a senior dog.

programme.title: No Demo Reno: Hello Yellow
programme.desc: Jenn carves out more work and storage space for a growing family that incorporates their favorite color: yellow. Next, she helps a mom who regularly hosts gatherings update her 20-year-old home with a welcoming living area and entertainer's kitchen.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Lucky in Lafayette
programme.desc: This Louisiana man was homeless and crashing on his son's couch when he won $2 million. Now David is helping the lucky overnight millionaire find the perfect property in Lafayette where he can party with his family and enjoy his fortunes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Old Florida Charm
programme.desc: When a New York couple won $7 million on the lottery, they said goodbye to hard work in the Big Apple and hello to sunny retirement in Vero Beach, Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: A Spacious Win
programme.desc: A single mom won $3 million on the lottery and wants more space after sharing an apartment with her three growing girls. With four ladies to please, David Bromstad has his hands full finding a home with rooms for everyone and space to spread out.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Vacation Time at the Cape
programme.desc: A Massachusetts couple has been vacationing with their family in Cape Cod for over 30 years, and thanks to a scratch-off jackpot, they're buying a dream home there! David must work fast to help them snatch up their perfect place in this hot market.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: King and Queen of M'Orlando
programme.desc: David gets to stay at home as he helps lucky newlyweds find their dream home in Orlando, Florida. After winning a million dollars on their anniversary, this couple wants for a two-story house where they can feel like royalty overlooking the neighborhood.

programme.title: Happily Wherever: Family Ties or Unleashed Adventure?
programme.desc: A recently married couple is eager to purchase their first home and plant roots. Having the freedom to live anywhere, the couple is torn between staying near family and friends in their beloved hometown of Los Angeles or making a radical move to Colorado.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Follow Your Nose
programme.desc: After winning $1 million on a quick pick Powerball ticket, a woman and her husband call on David Bromstad to help find their forever home. The house must come with a certain smell, however, challenging David to find one that passes her sniff test.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: New Love, New Home

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home: Reinvention in Las Vegas

programme.desc: A couple wins a million dollars, but instead of buying their own dream home, they want to buy one for their son that they can live in, too.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Bridal Bath Wrath

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Emeralds Aren't Forever
programme.desc: The Shahs ring in the Persian New Year with food, fun and plenty of drama. Haunted by his past, Mike chooses not to invite his girlfriend to the festivities at his mother's house and everyone has an opinion.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: It's Passover: Let Your Girlfriend Go!

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Sex, Lies and iPhone Videos

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Closet Murderer
programme.desc: When a 98-year-old widow is found dead in her entryway closet, a chilling discovery leads investigators to a killer in the community who harbors a dark secret.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: Second Chance to Kill
programme.desc: Police hunting the killer of a beloved grandfather believe his missing truck holds the key to the case. After hunting down suspect after suspect, local PD found a killer close to home, wielding a shocking kill weapon in a story of sickening betrayal.

programme.title: Kemper on Kemper: Lost Case Files
programme.desc: Former FBI agent John Douglas takes us through his extensive interviews with Kemper.

programme.title: Living With a Serial Killer: Scotland's Worst Predator: Peter Tobin
programme.desc: Peter Tobin raped and murdered Angelika Kluk in 2006, but police suspected this was not his first kill. With the help of Tobin's ex-wife Cathy Wilson, a ground-breaking investigation unearthed more victims, and revealed Tobin as a serial killer.

programme.title: Living With a Serial Killer: The Suffolk Strangler: Steve Wright
programme.desc: For 10 days in 2006, an unidentified killer terrified the rural town of Ipswich snatching five prostitutes from the streets and strangling them to death. When Pam Wright discovers that the killer was her own partner, her world begins to crumble.

programme.title: Exhumed: Written in Blood
programme.desc: A typical summer morning for four-year-old Heidi Jones turned into a nightmare when she found her mother dead in the living room. Law enforcement work feverishly to solve the murder of Loretta Jones. An exhumation is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Exhumed: Killer Cowboy
programme.desc: On April 28th, 1982, two men fishing east of Nashville, TN discovered a decaying body in the woods, later identified as Gene Stump. Detectives find a suspect, but only an exhumation will ensure justice is served.

programme.title: Exhumed: Evil Deception
programme.desc: Weeks from giving birth, Meg Purk is found dead in her home of an apparent suicide. Did Meg really kill herself and her unborn baby, or is the truth more horrible than anyone can imagine? It will take an exhumation to unearth the truth.

programme.title: Exhumed: A Murderer Among Us
programme.desc: When grandmother Erma Prince dies after a simple hip surgery, fears spread that a killer nurse could be responsible. The police do everything they can to track down the killer including exhuming Erma's body.

programme.title: Dateline: What Happened to the Beauty Queen?
programme.desc: A local beauty queen is found beaten to death in her home, conflicting physical evidence leaves the detectives and the townspeople at odds.

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Payson Canyon
programme.desc: A man took pride in preparing for every possible threat, so when he was found dead at home, those who know him were stunned.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: For a day that ended so tragically, it started with roses. Nathan and Denise Leuthold had known each other since grade school. Together they built their family on faith, but in a flash, one of them was dead and the other was under suspicion.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: When a town councilwoman is gunned down in her home, the only evidence left behind is a bouquet of plastic roses. As detectives work to find the triggerman, they learn that the person calling the shots is closer to home than they originally thought.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted
programme.desc: A man is shot after answering a local help wanted ad. Detectives soon discover there are other victims with eerily similar stories. Their quest to locate a possible serial killer leads them to a suspected killer working for an evil manipulator.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: I Love You to Pieces
programme.desc: A father shoots a masked intruder after he is ambushed in his own garage. As the unknown assailant clings to life, LAPD try to make sense of the strange situation, revealing a twisted web of manipulation and lies within this unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: The Secret to Their Success
programme.desc: The insects and their close relatives are the most abundant and diverse group of animals in the world. The secret to their success could be their external skeleton and their size.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: The Making Of
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes, revealing many challenges the filmmakers faced while making of Seven Worlds, One Planet.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: South America
programme.desc: A look at the most species rich continent on Earth: South America. In the Andes, pumas hunt guanaco while rarely seen bears search for mini avocados. In the Amazon, poison dart frogs care for their babies and colourful macaws eat clay.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of Egypt: Hunt for Queen Nefertiti

programme.desc: Dr. Oakley removes an odd lump from a French bulldog and investigates a cat’s seizures.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks
programme.desc: When cameras record a strange creature in the wilderness perform an incredible feat of strength, some suspect it's hard proof of Bigfoot; using cutting-edge science, experts investigate if they've discovered the spawn of Sasquatch and Iron Man.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Escobar's Ghost
programme.desc: Moments before Pablo Escobar's abandoned luxury building is demolished, cameras capture footage of a ghostly figure in the window, and some believe it was the notorious drug lord himself; experts investigate who this phantom was and what happened to them.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Possessed by an Alien
programme.desc: When footage reveals a man's leg taking on a life of its own, it appears that something alien is trying to burst free; cutting-edge science investigates what explains this strange and sinister possession, and what it takes to exorcise the invader inside.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: End Times on Lake Michigan
programme.desc: An abandoned industrial complex on the shores of Lake Michigan was once a top-secret military compound that protected America from enemy attacks; new discoveries reveal what really happened here and why the government turned its back on this juggernaut.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Inside El Chapo's Escape
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal how El Chapo escaped from a high security prison in Mexico. Mysterious patterns in the Australian outback and the Kalahari Desert spark a major scientific investigation. A giant black stain appears in a war-torn area of Iraq.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Sea Monster
programme.desc: A strange mass breaches the surface of an ocean near Antarctica, sparking rumors of a mythological sea monster. An area of the US-Mexico border becomes an international mystery. Ancient rock carvings in a mountain range depict weird, unearthly beings.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Phantom Island
programme.desc: When an island off the coast of Mexico suddenly disappears, government officials scramble to find an explanation; cutting-edge technology might reveal if the strange place was destroyed by a foreign power or if it existed at all.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Damned of Devil's Island
programme.desc: Mysterious satellite images lead an archaeologist to investigate a cemetery on Devil's Island, the notorious penal colony in the tropics of South America; what he finds there reveals evidence of grisly executions that fueled a shark feeding frenzy.

programme.title: What on Earth?: North Korea Death Star
programme.desc: When satellites spot a mysterious structure in North Korea, experts investigate if this sinister evidence points to a looming nuclear threat, and using cutting-edge tech, they reveal dark secrets from this strange place.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gate to the Viking Gods
programme.desc: New evidence reveals dozens of bizarre circular structures buried in the remote hills of Norway. An expert investigation uncovers a mysterious burial ground that may have been a portal to the Viking spiritual realm.

programme.title: What on Earth?: America's Swamp Castle
programme.desc: Satellite images capture bizarre structures in the remote and inhospitable swamplands of Louisiana. Experts investigate a forgotten war-torn fortress with a mysterious connection to the sinking ruins of a classified military installation.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of the Vampires
programme.desc: Satellite images reveal a long-lost village buried in a dense forest; archaeologists investigate and uncover a mysterious gravesite with the remains of decapitated skeletons and possible evidence of vampire burials.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Temple of the Island Eater
programme.desc: Satellites capture evidence of a mysterious structure in a remote and rocky area of Hawaii, and when experts investigate, what they find could point to human sacrifices and the wrath of a shape-shifting god.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Horror of Dead Man's Island
programme.desc: When a gigantic ship emerges from the sands of a strange island, experts investigate; what they find reveals evidence of a horrific Viking massacre.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Stalin's Secret Atlantis
programme.desc: When experts spot what appears to be an abandoned city in the Caspian Sea, they investigate declassified Cold War evidence to reveal an Atlantis-like city built by the Soviets; what they find exposes its long-lost secrets.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Deadly Decision
programme.desc: After beautiful and brilliant Tiffany Jenks is killed in Fairview Oregon, an investigation uncovers multiple suspects, including Tiffany's ex-boyfriend and three strangers who meet her at a bar and reveals a twisted and mysterious motive for murder.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Eyes on Her
programme.desc: Two young women are savagely murdered. One has gone fishing only to turn up beaten and drowned, and the other is a pregnant mother attacked while on the job delivering newspapers.

programme.title: Web of Lies: California Scheming
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams online, radio DJ Alan Lee Lama moves over a thousand miles to be with her. When her best friend gets involved, he gets caught up in a bizarre love triangle.

programme.title: Web of Lies: The Deadly Hoax
programme.desc: When a tech-savvy computer whiz fails to make the grade as a pro video gamer, he becomes obsessed with finding internet infamy. What starts as an online prank spirals into a new, deadly crime called 'swatting' that chills the nation.

programme.title: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: Jealousy turns into raging violence when a young woman decides to focus all her attention into her love of dance.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Broken Hearts
programme.desc: '48 Hours' explores a tale of tragedy to triumph and how a killer's heart saved the life of a dying woman in need of a transplant.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Gone in 90 Seconds
programme.desc: When an 11-year-old Arizona girl vanishes while waiting for an ice cream truck, it's clear she's been abducted. The search for her leads to a trail of suspects, making it the largest missing child investigation in Arizona history.

programme.title: Dancing With the Devil
programme.desc: Jealousy turns into raging violence when a young woman decides to focus all her attention into her love of dance.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Reuschel vs. Reuschel
programme.desc: A wealthy Florida businessman is arrested after a violent confrontation with his wife, and his daughter's sumptuous wedding may have inspired his murderous rage.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Terror in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In 1998, a gifted Philadelphia graduate student is found murdered in her bed. The hunt for her killer forces police to reevaluate a series of unsolved crimes, turning the city upside down.

programme.title: Web of Lies: California Scheming
programme.desc: After meeting the woman of his dreams online, radio DJ Alan Lee Lama moves over a thousand miles to be with her. When her best friend gets involved, he gets caught up in a bizarre love triangle.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: If I Can't Have You
programme.desc: A grieving father goes on the attack; Jealous obsession ends in murderous rage; A victim faces her stalker; A prosecutor throws a temper tantrum in court; A hero judge chases prisoners who bolt.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Enough is Enough
programme.desc: A courthouse brawl after a manslaughter conviction; a woman claims Jesus is her attorney; a man becomes outraged when denied bond; a group text gone wrong; an attorney steals a wallet; a man flees an Ohio courtroom; a salad heist takes a violent turn.

programme.title: Vanity Fair Confidential: Dylann Roof's Radical White Rage
programme.desc: White rage drives a young man to murder nine black churchgoers in Charleston in 2015, and fuels a vicious bomb plot to kill Muslim refugees in Kansas. Authorities want to know where it will end.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Intent to Kill
programme.desc: Jack Jessee is fighting a losing battle with cancer, but his remaining time is cut short when he is stabbed to death in his own home. Police quickly decide this is no random robbery, but all the best suspects have iron-clad alibis.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Girls Gone
programme.desc: After a late night pizza run, Dana Woods and June Guerry go missing. As their frantic parents search for them, they see a strange man driving Dana's car, and the girls are never seen alive again.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: The Barefoot Killer
programme.desc: When Carolyn Krizan-Wilson claims a barefooted burglar shot her husband Roy McCaleb to death, police spend years trying to track down the mysterious killer. It is only with the onset of dementia does Carolyn finally reveal the missing clue.

programme.title: In Plain Sight: Buried in the Hills
programme.desc: When the severed head of Hervey Medellin is discovered by a sniffing dog in the famous Hollywood Hills, the violence of the dismemberment brings tabloid claims of serial killers and drug cartels.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Follow That Car
programme.desc: When a loving father is found murdered execution-style in his own home, investigators must follow the trail of his missing car to find his cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: True Conviction: Heinous, Atrocious and Cruel
programme.desc: Diana Duve's life seems idyllic - with close loved ones, a fulfilling nursing career, and a charming boyfriend. Then she suddenly vanishes, and the ensuing investigation unearths shocking revelations of a past riddled with vitriol and violence.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Lived A Double Life
programme.desc: Sonja Holt begins to suspect that her fiancé, Stafford Shaw, is living a secret double life. She can't imagine just how far he will go to keep everyone from finding out the truth about him or the terrible price that will be paid when his secrets collide.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: I'd Kill Them Again
programme.desc: Columbus, Georgia, police are blindsided by a triple homicide that rocks the foundation of this small community just south of Atlanta. An unlikely source provides investigators with the lead they need, resulting in a series of shocking arrests.

programme.title: See No Evil: Gold Pontiac
programme.desc: When roommates Amanda Douglas and Jennifer Sudar Sanders are gunned down in broad daylight, police suspect a personal motive. Detectives hunt for surveillance video of the womens' final hours, hoping it will reveal the clues they need to catch a killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Blue Blood
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2017, Assistant Chief Deputy Clint Greenwood is shot dead at point blank range at the Harris County courthouse outside Houston, Texas. With no witnesses, detectives launch a man hunt. Can security cameras lead them to Clint's killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Run From the Scene
programme.desc: On November 23, 2012, Pennsylvania DJ Ervin Holton is found shot dead on his friend's porch. With no witnesses, investigators spot cameras outside a nearby store Pointing directly at the crime scene.

programme.title: See No Evil: Run for the Door
programme.desc: In December 2013, 25-year-old Josh Richards was gunned down in the Luna Lounge nightclub in Appleton, Wisconsin. When detectives delve deeper into the investigation, they discover a camera has the potential to reveal the identity of a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Viking Apocalypse
programme.desc: Backed with overwhelming force, Pagan Vikings wrestle King Alfred for control of 9th century England.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Ninth Place at Poker
programme.desc: Randall Zandstra shot his ex-wife's boyfriend and got 12 years in jail. Due to a technicality, there was a retrial. Zandstra fled, ran to Vegas, winning big in poker and running mail fraud. Authorities finally track him down and he is now in a NJ prison.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Family Coming After Me
programme.desc: After a fight in a mall, Eric Quesada murders his ex-best friend in a drive-by shooting. He goes on the run to Mexico, where he is caught by Mexican officials. Quesada spends two years fighting extradition before being sent back to the US.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got Caught Via Email
programme.desc: When Edward Roberson and two fellow inmates went to the showers, they didn't come back. Breaking out, the three scaled the fences and made a run for it. Roberson has escaped and now has stolen guns, in a stolen car running for his life.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got To Get Bike Parts
programme.desc: In central Florida in 1991, Marvin Carson settled an argument with rival gang member Richard Hawk by shooting him repeatedly with an AK47. Carson then went on the run. But when he returned to his home town, police were tipped.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got a Video Rental Store
programme.desc: In 1975, Michael Brown killed Richard Sullivan during a robbery. Brown was convicted, and while in prison married a woman named Donna. He soon escaped so they could start a new life together. They lived for more than 15 years without incident.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Beautiful Samurai
programme.desc: In 12th Century Japan, a female samurai humiliates all the others. As lethal as she was lovely, Tomoe Gozen defeated the finest swordsmen, battled tyranny and was innovative on the battlefield.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Gathering Storm
programme.desc: On September 1st 1939, the most destructive war the world has ever known began as German troops invaded Poland. By the time it ended six years later, more than 70 million people would be killed and whole continents devastated.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Eastern Front
programme.desc: The war reaches a critical turning point as Hitler expands the war to a second front. German soldiers endure the unrelenting climate of the Eastern Front, and face the full-force of angry Red Army fighters.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II in Color: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: By mid-1943, Hitler was on the run. The reality of a war on two fronts had caught up with him. In the West an Allied assault on Italy threatened his southern flank. In the East, exhausted German troops were fighting against the Soviet military machine.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for the YMCA
programme.desc: The Kennebec Valley YMCA in Augusta, Maine needs a new play structure and the Cabin Masters know just the crew for the job! Ryan decides to build a workshop for Chase. The team works feverishly to finish both projects before everything freezes over.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Bunganuc Creek Landmark
programme.desc: The team take on an historic clammers' shack with a renovation that includes opening up boarded windows as well as clearing out animal droppings and years or trash and old machinery. Everyone in town watches as they work on the historic landmark.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Stable Family Ties
programme.desc: Chase and the crew have their work cut out for them turning a vacation cabin that was originally a 1920s horse barn into a stable building for a large family. The crew draw on the past as inspiration and want to honour the owners' late parents.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Finding Small Town Texas Charm for a Young Family
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna take their new clients, Noah and Jessica Dansby, on a tour through three homes in Hillsboro, Texas, a small charming city halfway between Dallas and Waco.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cosmic Cupcakes
programme.desc: Expect out of this world creations when four bakers compete for the chance to launch their cupcakes into the stratosphere at a black tie gala celebrating the arrival of Space Shuttle Endeavour in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Annie the Musical
programme.desc: Bakers fight for the chance to have their cupcakes at the centre of a party celebrating the revival of Annie.

programme.title: Chopped: Sports Stars
programme.desc: Danica Patrick, Tiki Barber, Chuck Zito and Natalie Coughlin are four athletes who feel right at home in the kitchen battling it out for charity.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Redeem
programme.desc: Four teen chefs return to the Chopped Kitchen with victory, and redemption, on their minds. With lump meat crab and mayo in the first basket, crab cake seems like the safe route.

programme.title: Chopped: Chopped Gastropub
programme.desc: The four chefs learn that the mystery ingredients must be transformed into delicious gastropub food. House-smoked bacon and homemade pickles are found in the appetizer baskets.

programme.title: Chopped: Say Cheese!
programme.desc: Cheese is not just a key ingredient for many comfort food classics, it's also the theme for this competition. In the first round, the chefs must make creative use of blue cheese and goats cheese in their appetizer plates.

programme.title: Chopped: We Love Leftovers!
programme.desc: All leftovers in the baskets today, and some of the chefs are not happy to hear the news. In the first round the competitors must work with what is left in a casserole dish and at the bottom of a takeout bag.

programme.title: Chopped: Chili Cook-Off
programme.desc: The chefs battle in a Chopped chili challenge as they put their own spin on the classic American dish. Chocolate and sausage are two of the mandatory ingredients in the appetizer round.

programme.title: Chopped: Sitcom Moms
programme.desc: Four funny women, who are best known for playing mothers on TV, take on the role of Chopped competitor.

programme.title: Chopped: Chocolate Rush!
programme.desc: A surge of excitement is felt in the 'Chopped' Kitchen when the chefs find out that every mystery basket will contain chocolate! In the first round, the chefs must figure out how to make chocolate ingredients work with pork chops.

programme.title: Chopped: Cloche Call
programme.desc: Two cultures collide in the first round, when the chefs must combine kimchi and gefilte fish.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Killer Combos
programme.desc: Roger Mooking explores the foods that are just too good together to be kept apart, showcasing 15 culinary combinations that make mouths water and hearts race. From an extraordinary take on chicken and waffles to a handmade root beer float.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Spring Celebration in Kentucky
programme.desc: Richard McCallister invites Roger to his annual spring celebration in Lancaster, Kentucky. Richard and Roger cook a flock of spring chicken in their outdoor contraption.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Coast to Coast Cookouts
programme.desc: Seattle chef Renee Erickson celebrates summer by smoking food in wine barrels.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard Feast
programme.desc: Chef Jason French prepares his food in a wood-fired oven and an outdoor smoker.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Mexican Feast
programme.desc: Roger meets with Chef Johnny Hernandez in San Antonio, Texas and cooks regional Mexican dishes in the ultimate outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Alabama BBQ
programme.desc: The American Barbecue Belt in the South stretches from the Carolinas to Texas, and today Roger heads to the heart of it - Alabama. Roger meets award-winning Pit Master Chris Lilly at Big Bob Gibson Bar-B-Q in Decatur.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Florida Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking cruises the Florida coastline for two fiery cookouts that bring the heat. First, he visits Chef Marcel Vizcarra, owner of modern Peruvian eatery Llama Restaurant in St. Augustine, Fla.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kicked Out/ Kick the Habit
programme.desc: When Kick's new hangout is taken over by Brad and his friends, Kick does everything in his power to keep the newfound space as his own.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickasaurus Wrecks/ Battle for the 'Snax
programme.desc: Kick is forced into a shrimp costume after being hired to perform during the halftime show for a local football team. Gunther's parents are forced to sell their beloved restaurant and move back to the old country unless Kick can help them get customers.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Dancing With the Enemy/ Tattler's Tale
programme.desc: When Kick gets paired with his nemesis in a dance competition, they must put their differences aside and combine their styles in order to win. Later, Kick devises a plan to stop his nosy neighbour's incessant tattling.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Obsession: For Kick/ Flush and Release
programme.desc: Gunther tries to convince Kick that a girl named Jackie is becoming more than his biggest fan. Kick learns about a legendary giant goldfish roaming the waters of the flood Gully.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Snowpolcalypse!/ According to Chimp
programme.desc: Kick causes the school bus to get trapped during a blizzard. Later, Kick brings home a lost chimp named Dr. Awesome and makes it his new pet. Kick soon realizes that the apparently cute little primate becomes destructive without chocolate bananas.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Morning Rush/ A Fistful of Ice Cream
programme.desc: In order to not fail the school year, Kick has one night to complete all of his missed homework assignments; To give his dad the best birthday gift ever, Kick tracks down a rare ice cream treat.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Dad's Car/ The Treasure of Dead Man Dave
programme.desc: Kick is about to be blamed for scratching Dad's car; Kick has to give an oral report.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Those Who Camp, Do/ Dog Gone
programme.desc: Brad decides to tag along when Kick vows to spend a night in the untamed wilderness and make it out alive. Later, Kick must track down a ferocious devil dog before Mrs. Chicarelly gets home and gets him grounded for life.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: For the Love of Gunther/ Father From the Truth
programme.desc: Kick trains his best friend to be a stuntman when Gunther reveals he has a crush.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Mellowbrook Drift/ Gift of Wacky
programme.desc: Kick challenges the physics nerd bully to a winner-takes-all, gravity-defying race.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Abandon Friendship!/ Braking the Grade
programme.desc: When Kick and Gunther's parents have a fight, the boys fear their friendship is over and go out to find new friends. Then, fearing he's bound to get bad grades, Kick does everything he can to keep his report card from his dad.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Things That Make You Go Boom!/ Kyle Be Back
programme.desc: Kick battles Brad to win a scavenger hunt; Kick's cousin tries to break a stunt record.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Frame Story/ And ... Action!
programme.desc: The principal accuses Kick of a crime he didn't commit, threatening to expel him from school. When Kick meets his female counterpart in a popular TV actress, he helps her discover her inner daredevil.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski: Suburban Daredevil: Kickin' Genes/ Clothes Call
programme.desc: When Kick finds out that his mom used to race speedboats, he asks for her help with an upcoming stunt. Kick promises to behave when his Mom drags him on an embarrassing shopping trip to the mall.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: No More Bunny Business/ Spa Day
programme.desc: Candace adopts a bunny that is really a rogue secret agent looking for Agent P. Then, Candace and Stacy's plans for a spa day inspire Phineas and Ferb.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bubble Boys/ Isabella and the Temple of Sap
programme.desc: Baljeet takes a break from his intense studying to go around town inside a giant bubble with Phineas and Ferb. Isabella, Adyson and the rest of the Fireside Girls go on an adventure to obtain a patch for sap collecting.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: A Summer to Remember Part 1 / A Summer to Remember Part 2
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: 101 Dalmatian Street: It's My Party / Fox in the Dog House
programme.desc: Follow the shenanigans of Dolly and Dylan and their 97 siblings in Camden Town, London.

programme.title: Beyblade: Burst Surge: Illusory Dragon! Mirage Fafnir!
Beyblade: Burst Surge: Dream Team! Tag Battle!
Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness
programme.desc: In a quest to attain manliness, Dipper ventures into the forest to battle the notorious Multi-Bear. Mabel tries to teach Grunkle Stan how to be attractive to women, particularly the waitress in the local diner, Lazy Susan.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne Theft Auto / Breakout Star
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Amphibia: Dating Season / Anne vs. Wild
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Depths of Cousin Fethry!
programme.desc: Cousin Fethry takes Huey and Dewey on an expedition to an undersea lab where they encounter the weirdest creature at the bottom of the sea.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Town Where Everyone Was Nice!
programme.desc: Donald reunites with his band, The Three Caballeros, while the family takes in the sites of a Brazilian town with a dark secret.

programme.title: DuckTales: Storkules in Duckburg!
programme.desc: Louie recruits Storkules for his professional monster extermination business, while Storkules faces his greatest challenge: being Donald’s roommate.

programme.title: DuckTales: JAW$!
programme.desc: Lena unleashes a magical megalodon in Scrooge's money bin.

programme.title: DuckTales: What Ever Happened to Della Duck?!
programme.desc: Marooned, Della struggles for survival against the foreign elements of the Moon.

programme.title: DuckTales: Friendship Hates Magic!
programme.desc: Stuck as a shadow, Lena tries to protect Webby from her suspicious new friend Violet during a supernatural sleepover.

programme.title: DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Outlaw Scrooge McDuck!
programme.desc: In the Old West, Scrooge and Goldie form a band of outlaws and stage a heist to save a small town from corrupt businessman, John D. Rockerduck.

programme.title: Movie: When the Game Stands Tall
programme.desc: Legendary football coach Bob Ladouceur made history when he coached the De La Salle High School Spartans to an astonishing 151-game winning streak over the span of 12 years. Caught up in the pressure and glory, when the team finally loses, they fall hard.

programme.title: Studio C
programme.desc: The whole cast welcomes you to Season 5 of Studio C, Matt finds a new world in his couch, and James's friends try to explain how to walk properly.

programme.title: Tricked!: Lights Out
programme.desc: Eric's magic tricks include Lights Out, Faux Tie, House of Cards, Appearing Cookie, and French Soap.

programme.title: Made Up: Coulter Family: Jazz Hands
programme.desc: A jazz-loving Dad believes that he has ruined a massive (and expensive) recording session when his daughter, made up as a reclusive, bearded, 50-something musician, blames him for destroying a set inside a recording studio.

programme.title: Show Offs: It's Raining Fur
programme.desc: New neighbors are scared away by Trevor and Penelope, who use flying cats and lonely llamas to get to them.

programme.title: Tricked!: Weather
programme.desc: Eric Leclerc goes undercover with hidden cameras to pull mind-bending pranks.

programme.title: The Inspectors: Trial by Error
programme.desc: A construction company is receiving threatening letters for building on a site that is filled with old trees. Preston's pre-law class is having a mock trial, and he enlists Veronica and Noah to try to win.

programme.title: Lark Rise to Candleford
programme.desc: Laura Timmins says goodbye to her friends and family as she begins her new job working at the Post Office. Though she is first welcomed, a dispute divides her loyalties.

programme.title: The Story Trek: It Broke Me
programme.desc: Todd finds himself at the Grand Ole Opry and talks with a street performer who hopes to sing there.

programme.title: Food Factory USA: That's a Wrap
programme.desc: Now outselling hamburger and hotdog buns, tortillas are taking America by storm.

programme.title: Movie: Going in Style

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: Black smoke billowing above the Fraser Valley sends fire crews and Ken Duperon racing to the Mission Towing yard. A cracked trailer in deep snow becomes a delicate recovery for Rick and Brandon.

programme.title: Biography: 'Stone Cold' Steve Austin
