programme.title: Hoarders: Beverly/ Megan
programme.desc: Beverly's home is filled with TV's, recorders, and boxes and stacks of video cassettes. Megan is living in her hoarded, mouse-infested home with a one-week-old baby and her two older children.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Cobra
programme.desc: Cobra wants to clean up his 37-acre property, but the cleaners will have to contend with an unsanitary and unstable house as well as a trailer home and multiple ruined cars.

programme.title: Hoarders: Meryl
programme.desc: Meryl chased a shopping high, and ended up with a massive debt and a falling out with her brother's family. With the City of Worchester threatening eviction, the experts help clean up her property.

programme.title: Biography: Chris Farley: Anything for a Laugh
programme.desc: In his all-too-brief career, Chris Farley connected viscerally with audiences, creating hilarious characters that have stood the test of time. Behind his over-the-top stage presence were insecurities that were deeply tied to his addictive personality.

programme.title: Biography: Jeff Foxworthy: Stand-Up Guy
programme.desc: Jeff's brand of relatable humor has made him a household name, yet his personal life and story remains obscured from those outside his inner circle.

programme.title: Biography: 'Macho Man' Randy Savage
programme.desc: 'Macho Man' Randy Savage's catch phrases, larger-than-life personality and flash wardrobe made him one of the most colorful and charismatic Superstars to ever enter the ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: The guys have fast fingers at a focus group and leave no cereal box unturned at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser opens a can of something fierce at a local donation center.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: It's all play and no work when the guys square off in a toy-pitching competition. And tonight's big loser has to quiet down patrons in a food court.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q try to hold it together as receptionists checking in some strange characters. Later, they offer up odd rewards to helpful strangers, and the big loser gets the stuffing squished out of him at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Learn why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Learn how the art department rigged the automatic salad dispenser, which Joker was sick during filming and how the audio team recorded customers at the drive-thru.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Rock Botton
programme.desc: The guys 'do the farts' with actor Jeff Daniels, and then try to get strangers to take their sides in ridiculous arguments. Later, tonight's loser finds himself up against a wall around a group of college students.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Learn how the art department rigged the automatic salad dispenser, which Joker was sick during filming and how the audio team recorded customers at the drive-thru.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins His Vacation
programme.desc: Adam Conover and his girlfriend take a journey across America, where he reveals that Mount Rushmore was built on stolen Native American land, Vegas slot machines are purposely designed to be addicting, and a whole lot more.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Suburbs
programme.desc: Adam explains that your lawn is an unnatural monstrosity, suburban design is killing you, and the racist past of suburbs led to segregation in schools.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Night Out
programme.desc: Adam and Emily prepare for a big night out by revealing the marketing ploy that led to women shaving and the fashion agendas that created pockets. Then, the two friends pour back the truth on alcohol consumption.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Murder
programme.desc: Adam shines a headlight on why drivers are rarely prosecuted for car accidents that result in death. He breaks down border patrol's problematic search policies and examines the messed-up history of corpses and medical studies.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Smartest Inventions 13
programme.desc: These inventions could put Thomas Edison to shame, from a bird feeder with a shocking high-voltage surprise, to a bowl made entirely of bacon and a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Fitness Goals

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Card Against Humanity

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Chopped: Teen Tournament: Finale Fight
programme.desc: Four teens winners have returned to compete in the grand finale of the tournament with $25,000 at stake. The young cooks find a surf-and-turf combination in the first round. Butchering skills come into play in the entree round.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food and Bon Bons
programme.desc: Guy rolls coast to coast looking for flavour, and finds it in the most interesting places.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Gone Global
programme.desc: Guy tries a Venezuelan sandwich loaded with shredded beef, black beans, and cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Pizza, Pancakes and Pork
programme.desc: A pizza joint makes pies with homemade toppings, and a unique crepe-filled lasagne.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cannoli, Fritters and Wings
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's rolling out for a festival of flavours. In Portland, Ore., the Guamanian food truck is serving up righteous shrimp fritters and a unique spin on chicken salad.

programme.desc: Guy's grabbin' grub piled high on bread and buns. In Colorado Springs, a funky joint is going scratch-made and local with their Pueblo chili burger and a hangover specialty. Then, Guy visits a family-run sandwich shop in Washington D.C.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Fresh Fish and Funky Chicken
programme.desc: Guy is hitting the road for some outrageous seafood and tasty chicken. In Des Moines, Iowa, the trophy-winning barbecue joint is dishing out unique wings and an apple dumpling dessert.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast, West Coast
programme.desc: Guy visits a California joint to try spicy pork and knockout gnocchi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Pork To Pasta
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diggin' into everything from pork to pasta on this trip. In Chicago, a real-deal Italian spot with righteous ravioli and dynamite deep dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Concert With Friends
programme.desc: Trisha treats her amazing backup singers to a night out and a picnic-friendly menu of spicy black eyed pea salad, jerk chicken with tropical chutney, spiced plantain chip with mint garlic sauce and mango lime spritzers before a surprise John Legend show.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Inside Studio T
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood shares a look inside the recording process at the historic Allentown Studios in Nashville. After wrapping up a studio session for the day, she invites the crew over for a well-deserved meal of BBQ peach pulled pork.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: My Delaware Days
programme.desc: Valerie looks back at childhood memories of Delaware and serves up classics from the state like steamed clams with spicy garlic bread, lump crab cakes with cocktail remoulade and sautéed spinach, chocolate peanut butter cakes and apple butter.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Reunited and It Tastes So Good
programme.desc: Some of the best reunions are last minute – life gets so busy, but we still want to make time for our friends! Today, my pal Mackenzie Phillips and I are having a spontaneous get-together, and I'm prepping a few dishes that are quick but super impressive.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Breakfast on the Run
programme.desc: It's the story of three awesome grab and go breakfasts. Breakfast cookies are a perfect jump start on the morning. Then there's a bountiful bento box with baked oatmeal and individual ham casseroles. Finally, Todd makes apple granola stackers.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: All Grown Up
programme.desc: Ree Drummond packs a kitchen-equipment care package for her daughter, Alex, working in Dallas. There's a delicious quarter sheet pan supper that's quick to make after a day in the office.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Hotter and Hotter
programme.desc: Ree Drummond turns up the heat in the ranch kitchen with some seriously spicy eats. She transforms jalapeno pimento cheese dip into a fiery grilled cheese, gives roasted chipotle fish tacos a real kick and makes hot and cheesy baked meatballs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Dim Sum Date Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes adorable bites of scrumptiousness for a dim sum date night. The menu includes steak buns with creamy peanut sauce, crispy veggie buns, addictive shrimp toasts and egg custard tarts for dessert.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Gratitude to First Responders
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is cooking for her friend's firefighter nephew and his wife, a nurse, to thank them for keeping their community safe and healthy. Her menu includes smoked turkey sandwiches, blistered shishito peppers and s'mores bars.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Trisha's FAN-tastic Favorites

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Who Is This Vod Kanockers?

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Sea Is a Harsh Mistress
programme.desc: Charlie tries surfing in order to impress a beautiful girl, with disastrous results. He later tells Alan that when his life was hanging in the balance, their deceased father came to him and made a request that Charlie is reluctant to fulfill.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Pot-Smoking Monkey
programme.desc: Alan is determined to gain custody of his and Kandi's dog after she walks away from their split with both the condo and the car. Having also lost everything to Judith following their divorce, Alan decides to hire her lawyer.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: A Live Woman of Proven Fertility
programme.desc: Alan is overjoyed that he'll no longer owe Judith alimony when she marries Herb. When their marriage plans are threatened due to Jake's disdain for his soon-to-be-stepfather, Alan enlists Charlie's help to keep Herb from getting cold feet.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Apologies for the Frivolity
programme.desc: Though Charlie despises his sharp-tongued, passive aggressive mother, he's strangely attracted to Lydia, an attractive, blonde high-end real estate agent, just like his mother. Unfortunately, the similarities don't end there.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie have different opinions about Deacon and Kelly's recent separation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Departure Time
programme.desc: When Doug goes to meet his parents at the airport, they ask him to sign their living will.

programme.desc: After Christine wins at tennis against her new boyfriend, he has a surprisingly odd reaction to her competitiveness.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Unidentified Funk

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Happy Endings

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Notes on a 7th Grade Scandal

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: What Happens in Vegas Is Disgusting in Vegas
programme.desc: Typically tightened-up New Christine loses all her inhibitions at a spur-of-the-moment bachelorette party Christine and Barb throw for her in Vegas.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Old Christine: Reckless Abandonment
programme.desc: When Barb and Matthew both announce they're moving out and Ritchie leaves for science camp, Christine tries to prove to everyone, including herself, that she's capable of taking care of herself.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Where's Charlie?
programme.desc: After Miles gives Rose a friendship ring, Rose becomes convinced Charlie is trying to contact her from the grave with the message that he disproves of her relationship with Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dateline, Miami

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show
programme.desc: A hurricane is brewing, and not just outside, when Stan visits to tell Dorothy he's over her and moving on. Dorothy quickly discovers he's moving on with her sister, Gloria.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Monkey Show

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Pitz Carlton
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a dehydrated dog in the blazing heat. An anxious, abandoned dog is moved to a new warehouse for dogs with special needs. And, Tia and the twins help a friend of the rescue find the perfect match.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Mother of Chaos
programme.desc: Now a mother of two, Lizzy leans on Tia to help find a work-life balance. A California couple hopes to adopt a dog comfortable in the pool, and Mariah's mission to save an injured dog abandoned in the rain leads her to something completely unexpected.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Mother of Chaos
programme.desc: Now a mother of two, Lizzy leans on Tia to help find a work-life balance. A California couple hopes to adopt a dog comfortable in the pool, and Mariah's mission to save an injured dog abandoned in the rain leads her to something completely unexpected.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: At a Mississippi shelter, Tia gives a hybrid wolf-dog a second chance. At the vet, Lizzy is forced to make a tough call for a new VRC resident and later helps a pair of hearing impaired canines. Then, a California man visits to find a fur-friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Our Gift
programme.desc: When Tia receives an adoption email unlike any she's seen before, she makes a cross-country trip to find a dog a special home in time for Christmas. And, the kid's significant others band together to give the family a present they'll never forget.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Hounded
programme.desc: When a dog that was adopted out mysteriously appears in a shelter in Mississippi, Tania and Earl head to the rescue. Parolee Joe is left shaken after separating two stray dogs fighting outside the shelter. And a hound dog adoption doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Sound of Silence
programme.desc: At a Mississippi shelter, Tia gives a hybrid wolf-dog a second chance. At the vet, Lizzy is forced to make a tough call for a new VRC resident and later helps a pair of hearing impaired canines. Then, a California man visits to find a fur-friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Broken Home
programme.desc: Tia and Matt are heartbroken when they are called to pick up some dogs whose owner has recently passed away. Then, a potential adopter is looking for a dog that will thrive in a B&B.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Unleashed
programme.desc: Looking back at the most memorable moments of season six. Go behind the scenes for never before seen moments and catch up with past favourites.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: Tia scrambles after receiving a phone call about a severely emaciated pit bull, one of the worst cases she has ever seen. And, a campaign to build a shelter in a NY prison depends on Earl to convince authorities about the benefits of prison dog programs.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Out of Control
programme.desc: Officers Boudreau and Hannett pursue a pair of intoxicated, out of control, teenage dirt bikers. Officer Bronson investigates a night-hunting case involving an animal he's never dealt with. And Officer Lucas gets creative trying to rescue a baby bird.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Cold Case
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Lucas help state police investigate a 19-year-old missing person case. A landowner requests help with a group of squatters on an island in the Connecticut River. And, Officer Towne comes to the aid of an injured hawk.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Manhunt
programme.desc: Officer Glen Lucas races to the scene of an ATV accident. When a home is broken into, Officers Bill Boudreau and Eric Hannett assist police in tracking the suspect. Officer Bob Mancini tries to save the life of an injured loon.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Way Out
programme.desc: When an out of state hunter appears to be lying about the circumstances surrounding his deer kill, Officers Bob Mancini and Kevin Bronson investigate. Conservation Officers work with volunteers to recover the body of a missing hiker on Mt. Washington.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Truth or Consequences
programme.desc: In New Hampshire, Officer Glen Lucas investigates a dispute between a turkey hunter and an eyewitness. Sergeant Todd Szewczyk hunts down a trespassing target shooter and Officers McKee and Matson fish for the truth from trespassing ATV riders.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Collision Course
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett track a hunter at an illegal bait site. Officers Towne, Matson and Jones investigate a teenage hunter with a changing story. And a routine patrol in icy conditions becomes a life-changing event for Officer Lucas.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers
programme.desc: Game Warden McGee rushes to a domestic altercation. Game Wardens Zuniga and Roel run into trespassers, while Provasnik inspects a potentially stolen jet ski. Game Wardens Richards and McGee team up on an investigation, and a baby squirrel is rescued.

programme.desc: Lyndsay and Leslie execute their vision to entice high-end buyers to an outdated rambler. They unveil the home's hidden potential by opening up the floorplan and decorating with a transitional style throughout, leading to an unbelievable offer.

programme.desc: Siblings struggling to sell their sister's home need Lyndsay and Leslie's expertise. The twins redefine the dated two-bedroom rambler into a modern three-bedroom farmhouse with a deck that will be enjoyed even on a rainy Pacific Northwestern day.

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: Entertaining Oasis

programme.title: Fixer to Fabulous: A New Lease on Life

programme.desc: This is a story about faith, temptation and secrets. A churchgoing mom was shot at point-blank range in her garage. Saving her would take a miracle and investigators wanted to know if this crime was random or if someone wanted her dead.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Lynn Friend was a devoted mother with wedding plans when she vanished. The question was whether she was a runaway bride, or if she ran into trouble. Investigators searched land and sea, going to unexpected depths to solve the mystery.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: A Deadly Inferno
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes a rural Nebraska town when their beloved high school volleyball coach dies in a fiery car accident. But as investigators reconstruct her tragic death, the resulting clues steer the investigation to reveal a horrifying series of events.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Relentless
programme.desc: A Texas woman's apparent suicide devastates the family that she leaves behind. But after one investigator dedicates decades to solving the mystery of what drove her to make such a tragic decision, a truth that is far more sinister is discovered.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: When a town councilwoman is gunned down in her home, the only evidence left behind is a bouquet of plastic roses. As detectives work to find the triggerman, they learn that the person calling the shots is closer to home than they originally thought.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con
programme.desc: A navy veteran is brutally stabbed in his senior living community. As detectives work to find the killer, they discover a persuasive con artist. Could this scammer have graduated from fraud to murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Along Came Jodi
programme.desc: A man and woman had chemistry right from the start. Then he was killed and she was arrested. The trial riveted millions, exposing Jodi's secret.

programme.title: Dateline: The Carrollton Plot
programme.desc: Churchgoing wife and mother, Nancy Howard, is accosted at her home and shot in the head. She miraculously survives and calls 911.

programme.title: Dateline: The Carrollton Plot

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets and Lies

programme.title: Dateline: Toxic
programme.desc: Kevin and Morgan Mengel were happy at first, but when the marriage went bad, he went missing. Police wondered if he simply left, but a family's relentless pursuit lead to a stunning confrontation and, eventually, the truth.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Fatal Attraction

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Victims Wanted

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: I Love You to Pieces
programme.desc: A father shoots a masked intruder after he is ambushed in his own garage. As the unknown assailant clings to life, LAPD try to make sense of the strange situation, revealing a twisted web of manipulation and lies within this unsuspecting family.

programme.title: Snapped: Amy Fisher

programme.title: Snapped: Angela Ferguson

programme.title: Snapped: Angelina O’Mara
programme.desc: In the fall of 2011, homicide detectives in towns over two-hundred miles apart connect two separate murders to one ruthless killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Julene Simko

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Scorpion's Tale

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: China: Nature's Ancient Kingdom
programme.desc: Explore the Chinese government's national park pilot project to protect rare species.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands

programme.title: China: Nature's Ancient Kingdom
programme.desc: Explore the Chinese government's national park pilot project to protect rare species.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: North America
programme.desc: In winter, lynx prowl the Yukon for snowshoe hares and manatees seek hot springs to escape the freeze. In summer, Tennessee fish build spectacular underwater pyramids, fireflies light up the forest's nights, and polar bears leap from rocks as they hunt.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Canada's Coastal Forests
programme.desc: Canada's coastal forest is part of an ancient forest system that runs along the coast from California up to Alaska, and is home to some of the top predators in North America.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Asia
programme.desc: Visit the planet's largest continent. In the frozen north, walrus congregate in extraordinary numbers, bears gather inside volcanoes and yeti-like monkeys fight in the remote forests of China. In the tropical south, the last few Sumatran rhino roam.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Australia
programme.desc: A land cast adrift at the time of the dinosaurs. Here, kangaroos and wombats brave snowstorms and gum tree forests are filled with never-before-seen predators.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Antarctica
programme.desc: Only the strong can survive in Antarctica, the world's most hostile continent. Elephant seals battle for territories, king penguins gather in colonies, and great whales feast on krill bait.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Africa
programme.desc: Even in Africa, home of the greatest wildlife gatherings on Earth, wildlife faces many challenges.

programme.desc: Discover what goes into making tequila, waterbeds, flip-flops, and silver.

programme.desc: Discover how copy paper, jeans, computers and plate glass are made.

programme.desc: Featured: wood utensils; refrigeration units; moccasins; electronic impact drills.

programme.desc: Featuring nuno felt; drum crushers; kimchi; traditional parquet floors.

programme.title: How It's Made: Radiators, Hatchery Chicks, Phyllo Dough, Cross-Country Skis
programme.desc: Learn how radiators, hatchery chicks, phyllo dough and cross-country skis are manufactured.

programme.title: How It's Made: Binoculars, Sparklers, Rubber Boots and Circular Saw Blades
programme.desc: Find out how binoculars, sparklers, rubber boots, and circular saw blades are made.

programme.title: How It's Made: Riding Mowers, Popcorn, Adjustable beds, cultured diamonds
programme.desc: Discover how riding mowers, popcorn, adjustable beds, and cultured diamonds are made.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Three Miles on Castle Rock Road
programme.desc: After a young Native American woman is found brutalized and clinging to life on the side of a rural Montana road, her family and authorities seek answers. Their search for justice leads them down a shocking, sickening, and devastating road.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Enter Frame Left
programme.desc: When a young woman in Overland Park, Kansas disappears after a visit to the mall, investigators examine store surveillance footage and uncover a shocking abduction. Days later, the missing woman is found dead in the woods, exposing a horrific tragedy.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Trail of Blood
programme.desc: Nancy and her children are found dead in an apparent murder-suicide. Fifteen years later, Donna falls to her death in the Grand Canyon. But investigators discover they're linked and are confronted by a serial killer who's been lying in wait for decades.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Dying Words
programme.desc: Steven Galvin is dead and bodycam video captures the detectives hunt for his killer. As the case unravels, a surprise witness turns this case on its head. And a play-by-play of the crime will reveal new evidence that brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Don't Look Back
programme.desc: Karen Simek is a talented food service worker. When her body is found with a gunshot wound outside her office in the early morning hours, it leaves her family in shock and sparks a year-long investigation, which ultimately leads detectives to her killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: The Enemy Upstairs
programme.desc: When a new tenant in a Harlem apartment building has his advances toward his upstairs neighbor rebuffed, his anger sets off a chain of accusations, threats, and fights that culminate in bloodshed and shocking tragedy.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Truth Is Dangerous
programme.desc: Ty Underwood, a transgender woman, is found shot to death in her car, leaving detectives to wonder if she may have been a victim of a hate crime. Detectives use text messages, social media posts, and surveillance footage to track down her killer.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Who Shot Buckii?
programme.desc: It's the middle of the night when Delvin 'Buckii' Meadows is shot and killed in his neighbor's yard. As police investigate, it's not until witnesses come forward with information that detectives realize they may be the key to finding Delvin's killer.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Two women living next to each other in an apartment building become fast friends until becoming sworn enemies. Each enlists their sister as reinforcements in the escalating war between them; a conflict that ends in horrifically shocking violence.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Fire in the Desert
programme.desc: When Albuquerque, New Mexico mail carrier Marilyn Gandert disappears for days, no one knows where she could have gone. When her burnt body is found in the desert, detectives must find their murderer with few witnesses beyond Marilyn's family members.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Not In My House
programme.desc: A mother and daughter rent out two rooms of their house to old family friends. But as the new roommates grow closer, alliances start to shift and tempers flare until it all comes to a bloody end.

programme.title: Fear Thy Roommate: Uninvited Guest
programme.desc: Two women strike up a fast friendship and move in together. But a lack of privacy and a secret relationship rips apart the harmony, and a battle for control ends in a brutal murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Danger Travels
programme.desc: A retail store employee's crush on manager Antoinette Venditti Bruce escalates into an obsession after he's fired for inappropriate behavior. When she is transferred out of state for work, the stalker tracks her down to carry out his twisted plans.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Roadside Murder
programme.desc: Theresa Wesolowski was murdered on May 29, 1999, leaving police baffled for nearly 10 years. They finally got a break in the case when a new DNA technique identified a co-worker, Mark Libecki, who was convicted of 1st degree murder in 2009.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Who Killed Anna?
programme.desc: A 42-year-old Russian woman living the American dream in Texas is savagely gunned down in her garage. As investigators work the case, the list of suspects includes her controlling ex-husband, her boyfriend, an obsessive admirer, and a generous mentor.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Old Friends, Bad Neighbors
programme.desc: What starts as an idyllic relationship between neighbouring best friends and business partners takes a wrong turn and ends up in threats, restraining orders, litigation, and ultimately a triple homicide.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Lonesome Cowboy
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in a backyard, police have little to go on. The homeowner has recently disappeared, and all that he has left behind are clues posted online. Police wonder if they will lead to the identity of the victim, or the killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Price of Fame
programme.desc: In 2001, actor Robert Blake finds his new wife, Bonny Lee Bakely, shot in the head in the couple's car. The largest homicide investigation in LAPD history uncovers a story of blind ambition and betrayal.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Caught in the Act
programme.desc: Baseball loving wife and mother, Diane Fortenberry, is found unconscious on the floor of her burglarized home. Hours later, at the hospital, Diane succumbs to her injuries, and the entire resort town of Osakis, Minnesota, aids law enforcement.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Invisible Hand of Death
programme.desc: Two teens stumble upon a woman engulfed in flames, leaving detectives to wonder just who in her inner circle could kill so cruelly. Then, when a college student is strangled in his home, Lt. Kenda must figure out which of his roommates is lying.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: The Case that Haunts Me
programme.desc: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. As Det. Joe Kenda digs into who she is and what happened to her, he uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in perhaps the most intense interrogation of his career.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Winter's Bone
programme.desc: High in the mountains above Colorado Springs, a woman's frozen body is found along a switchback road. Before investigators can determine who's responsible for her death, they'll need to figure out what brought her here in the first place.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: All News Is Local
programme.desc: In August 2000, 19-year-old Jessica Carpenter was found dead in her Aiken, SC home by her own mother. Local reporters and family members tell the story of a town frozen in terror as police search for a possible serial killer on the loose.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vito Genovese
programme.desc: The story of Vito Genovese, who ruthlessly dealt with disloyalty in the Mafia and quickly rose to prominence - but unwittingly caused his own downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Arnold 'The Brain' Rothstein
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and set the model for running a crime business.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Hitler: The Opportunist
programme.desc: A look at the first three decades of Adolf Hitler's life unveils what transformed a down-and-out Austrian into the undisputed leader of the Nazi Party. We reveal the truth behind Hitler's time serving in World War One.

programme.title: Hitler: The Actor
programme.desc: Investigates Hitler's breathtaking rise from election defeat in 1928 to Germany's Messiah in 1933. Experts analyze his speeches, dissect his PR gift and interrogate the mind of a man who ruthlessly executes his closest comrade.

programme.title: Hitler: The Fuhrer
programme.desc: A look at the mind of a dictator as Hitler tightens his grip on Germany and turns his sights to conquest. Experts investigate the key skills that enabled him to turn the tables on Europe's foreign leaders.

programme.title: Hitler: The Victor
programme.desc: A look at Hitler's transformation from Fuhrer of the German people into the megalomaniac Nazi Messiah who triggers the global carnage of World War II.

programme.desc: Jeff and Sara Jones are Baylor sweethearts and newlyweds, returning to Waco to find a house where they can settle down and one day raise a family. Their all-in budget is $235,000, and they're hoping to find a house with three bedrooms.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: A Family Searches a Small Town for the Ultimate Open Space

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Son Surprises His Family With a Major Renovation
programme.desc: Chip and Joanna venture 40 miles outside of Waco to Mexia, Texas, to help empty nesters Kelvin and Culetta Beachum find a home to accommodate their children and grandchildren.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Rustic Italian Dream Home
programme.desc: Jenny and Ramil are moving to Waco, Texas, from California to be closer to Ramil's mother. Ramil originally wanted more of a move-in ready home, but Jenny convinced him to get a fixer upper, so they enlist the help of Chip and Joanna to find one.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Lazy River Runs Through It
programme.desc: Lucas and crew build their first lazy river! This private lazy river circumnavigates a real island, massive waterfalls and a giant grotto. Lucas kicks it up several notches with a state of the art audio/ video system, outdoor kitchen and special surprise!

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Pool-a-Vida
programme.desc: The crew heads to Plantation, Florida to bring Costa Rica to a young family's home. Lucas builds the ultimate jungle backyard that includes a beach volleyball court, a huge swim-in grotto and a spa complete with a giant water wall and a rain curtain.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Small Yard, Big Dreams
programme.desc: A dedicated caregiver gets her lifelong wish of having her own pool. Lucas faces the pressure of not only building a dream pool, but has to create it in a small backyard. The team transforms the family's yard into a little oasis with big potential.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: What's Up Dock?
programme.desc: Lucas builds a giant pool for a dear friend-turned client. Lucas creates a dream backyard with a dock, cascading waterfalls a fire pit and audio/visual entertainment swim-up bar.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Makeover in Missouri
programme.desc: Empty nesters leave snowy Indiana and find a large home on Lake of the Ozarks. The couple has a big renovation budget and wants to update the home to accommodate all their expected visitors. Unfortunately they soon discover a setback during demolition.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Otter Tail Transformation
programme.desc: A family is looking for a lake home in Otter Tail County, Minnesota. They find a property they like, but it's far from turnkey. With a massive renovation, they may discover they've bitten off more than they can chew.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lakeside Lounging on Lake Gaston
programme.desc: Amber and Jon are looking for a getaway near their home in Raleigh, NC, and Lake Gaston fits the bill. With assistance from their broker, they find a house with a price that's as perfect as the location but the condition of the home is less than ideal.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Steak Your Claim
programme.desc: Alton Brown 'reloads' his classic steak show with an entirely new recipe for a reverse-seared ribeye steak. He also reviews thermometer basics, how to cure a cast-iron skillet and why pre-salting meat can be the right thing to do.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Use Your Noodle: The Reload
programme.desc: Reloading an earlier episode, Alton revisits cold-water pasta cooking, and shares his recipe for Cacio a Pepe.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Yang
programme.desc: Seattle based chef Rachel Yang enters Kitchen Stadium to take on the winner of Iron Chief.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Fraser
programme.desc: Chef Fraser challenges Chef Symon to battle in Kitchen stadium.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Williams
programme.desc: Boston Chef Douglass Williams makes the most of a little vegetable in a battle against Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Thaimee
programme.desc: Bobby Flay faces off against Hong Thaimee of New York's Ngam.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Marino
programme.desc: Aspen chef Dena Marino enters kitchen stadium to take on Iron Chef Masaharu Morimoto.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Jackson
programme.desc: Jose Garces faces off against challenger Russell Jackson.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Bissonnette
programme.desc: Iron Chef Jose Garces faces off against challenger Chef Bissonnette, a former "Chopped" champion.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Guarnaschelli Vs. Anderson
programme.desc: Richmond, Virginia's schnitzel queen, Chef Brittanny Anderson, hopes that she doesn't leave Kitchen Stadium feeling blue after battling one of the Chairman's best, Iron Chef Alex Guarnaschelli.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Far From The Farm
programme.desc: Ali Khan starts his day in Des Moines the way Iowans do, with crisp and cheesy breakfast nachos. Then it's onto a roasted chicken lunch with comforting mashed potatoes and onion rings, before snacking on a truly divine Napoleon.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Homerun Barbecue
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in St. Louis looking for the best deals for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. First up to bat is a slider piled high with pulled pork and chorizo chili. For lunch under the arch, it's a jail cell pork belly BLT.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: C-Ville Eats
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Charlottesville, Va. for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack. College town food has never tasted so good.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Appetite for Annapolis
programme.desc: Ali Khan, full-blown food enthusiast and blogger, has 12 hours and only 35 bucks to find the best deals in Annapolis, Md. for breakfast, lunch, dinner and a snack.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Authentic In Athens
programme.desc: Ali Khan is in one of the coolest college towns in the country, Athens, Ga., to find the best breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals.

programme.title: Cheap Eats: Queen City Cravings
programme.desc: Ali Khan is out to find the best breakfast, lunch, dinner and snack deals in Charlotte, N.C. Good things take time, so Ali starts his day with the sweet and satisfying "slowberry" cobbler waffle.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Black-Owned Restaurants
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson takes a look at some amazing Black-owned restaurants. These business owners are passionate about their community, cultural history, family tradition and food.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Childhood Favorites
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson turns the clock back to being a kid, when life was simpler, and food tasted better. So, enjoy a blast from the past while we revisit some childhood favorites.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Vegas
programme.desc: Better bet it all on finding amazing food in Las Vegas as they know how to double down.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Low and Slow
programme.desc: Patience is a virtue, and the greatest mouthwatering dishes can't be rushed. Wolfgang Puck admires APL Restaurant in Los Angeles for making a sandwich that's well worth the wait.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Rise And Dine
programme.desc: Wake up and get ready to dine on some of the country's best breakfast dishes starting with Martha Stewart's favorite biscuits and country ham found in Nashville. Scott Conant then brings a new take on French toast.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Twin Cities
programme.desc: They say there's no place like home, and that's especially true for Andrew when it comes to the food scene in the Twin Cities.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: The Ozarks
programme.desc: Andrew visits the Ozarks where hunting and fishing are still a central way of life.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Krakow
programme.desc: From peasant food to royal snacks, Andrew reveals what makes the food scene in Krakow, Poland, so delicious. The city's edible symbols take the form of pierogis, hearty stuffed cabbage rolls and whole-roasted pork knuckle.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Merida
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern ventures to Merida, the capital of the Mexican state of Yucatan, to explore the Mayan- and Spanish-influenced culture and cuisine.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Scottish Highlands
programme.desc: Andrew explores the bountiful larder and proud history that provides chefs in the Scottish Highlands with the building blocks for uniquely Highland dishes. He enjoys lean, flavourful Highland beef, buttery shellfish, and handheld meat pies.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Harlem
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores Harlem, a vibrant New York City neighborhood with a diverse cross-section of cultures. He highlights its colorful restaurants offering soul food, Caribbean classics, and even the national dish of Senegal.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charleston, SC
programme.desc: Casey heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. He takes on the belt buster challenge where he must consume a two-pound burger, three pounds of nachos, a hulking order of tater tots and a 12-ounce milkshake in 20 minutes.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Electronic Connection

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Martha Stewart Have a Ball
programme.desc: Max and Caroline plan to attend a big fashion gala at a museum where Martha Stewart is scheduled to be a guest, in an attempt to have her taste their cupcakes and get her seal of approval.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Black-ish: Chop Shop
programme.desc: While Bow prepares for the Johnson family's annual Christmas card shoot, Dre takes Junior and Jack to the Barber Shop to get a haircut from his lifelong Barber, T.

programme.title: Black-ish: Is It Desert or Dessert
programme.desc: Dre has concerns about Jack and Diane spending the weekend with their friends' family in the desert. Meanwhile, Pops is forced to come to terms with how he treats women after he helps set Junior up.

programme.title: Walker: Freedom
programme.desc: Walker and Geri are both unsure of their feelings for each other after their kiss and things get very complicated when Hoyt comes home from prison. But the welcome home party is interrupted when Micki and Walker get a word that Clint West is on the run.

programme.title: Legacies: I Was Made to Love You
programme.desc: Hope's suspicion is piqued after Wade shares some startling news with her. To uncover the secrets of a mysterious artifact, Alaric must work with an enemy from his past. After Ethan finds himself in harm's way, MG must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Pothole
programme.desc: George loses a special Yankees key ring and goes to extreme lengths to locate it.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Baby Shower
programme.desc: Elaine asks Jerry to use his apartment for a baby shower. Kramer sells Jerry on the idea of getting an illegal cable hook-up.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Ergo, the Booty Call
programme.desc: Alan has second thoughts about whether he should be dating a woman half his age and is mortified at the idea of introducing Kandi to Evelyn at Jake's birthday party. Meanwhile, Rose continues her passive-aggressive pursuit of Charlie.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Not in My Mouth
programme.desc: Walden and Zoey's relationship suffers after a near-death experience. Meanwhile, Alan wonders if Lyndsey has a drinking problem.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Dungeons and Dragons, Anyone?
programme.desc: Adam convinces Coach Mellor to let him be team captain in gym class. He betrays his friends by picking the jocks first, causing the two rivalling squads to battle it out with the game the nerds know best: Dungeons and Dragons.

programme.title: Mom: Kalamazoo and a Bad Wedge of Brie
programme.desc: Christy’s plan to win her sponsor’s approval backfires, and the ladies rush in to help after Jill’s house is broken into.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: Mike and Chuck's plans to open a classic car renovation service crash when Joe is invited to join in. Also, Vanessa realizes that Mandy is tricking Kyle into doing all their married chores.

programme.title: Mom: Clumsy Monkeys and a Tilted Uterus
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie try to make sure everything goes smoothly when Violet finds the perfect couple to adopt her baby.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: So Loud I Broke Your Wall/ Jet Ski Scandal
programme.desc: An extreme response to a noise complaint; a damaged jet ski.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Ramos vs. Edwards

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Peebles vs. Peebles
programme.desc: A Missouri woman had 'revenge sex' to get back at her cheating husband, and he won't accept her daughter until a DNA test proves he's the dad.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Kelby is suing his ex Taylor for unpaid rent. Taylor stopped paying because her mom needed money, and she thinks Kelby is being evicted because she moved out and got engaged.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman claims that her sister stole money from her bank account after she got arrested, but her sister says she was defamed by her sibling on social media, spreading rumors about her having an STD.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Taking Advantage of an Ex ' and 'Trimming a Guy Where it Hurts.'

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'I Want My Money & I Want it Now ' and 'Losing Control.'

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: You Are Feeling Very Very Smoky/ Ripped Uniform
programme.desc: A woman sues a hypnotist after she is unable to quit smoking; a dog-sitter sues over damaged clothing.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Crystal is suing Pamela for 43 months of storage space, but Pamela says she never agreed to pay for storage. Then, Dana is suing James over a botched pool installment, but James said Dana didn't give her a chance to fix the pool.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Are You Allowing Men to Have Sex With Your Daughter for Money?
programme.desc: Paris says two weeks ago police and child services came to her door to investigate as she was being accused of allowing men to rape her young daughter for money. She was also accused of splitting the money with her mother, Rhoda.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Eye Opening Secrets

programme.title: Maury: Stop Lying to My Son ... We Both Know That's Not His Baby!
programme.desc: Treven and Katana are back as Treven has doubts he's the father of Katana's baby. John and his mom Patricia are denying that John is the father of Iyanna's daughter, and Patricia says she’s say Iyanna visiting another man light at night.

programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Soft Opening
programme.desc: Business booms for Max and Caroline's new cupcake walk-up window when word spreads about a shocking incident involving a rock star.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing
programme.desc: Dre's childhood best friend Gigi Franklin is in town, and Bow feels like an afterthought whenever the two of them are together. Dre and Gigi are like brother and sister, but it doesn’t help that Gigi is an international pop star with model looks.

programme.title: Black-ish: Relatively Grown Man
programme.desc: After Junior gets an offer for his dream job working with Migos, Dre and Bow are determined to convince him to return to college and get his degree.

programme.title: Charmed: Spectral Healing
programme.desc: The Charmed Ones discover a letter from their mother that may hold answers to burning questions. Meanwhile, Harry considers a life-changing decision and Jordan's good-will gets him into trouble.

programme.title: Dynasty: Vows Are Still Scared
programme.desc: Blake sits Fallon down for a father-daughter talk on her wedding day. Blake continues to try and fulfill his obligations, but ends up reaching out to Cristal for help. As things seem to turn to Alexis' favour, Dominique holds another card in her hand.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The English Patient
programme.desc: George is intrigued when a woman mistakes him for her boyfriend. Elaine becomes unpopular when she criticizes the movie 'The English Patient.' Jerry is drawn into a weightlifting contest with 80-year-old Izzy.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Jacket

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The Unfortunate Little Schnauser

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The War Against Gingivitis
programme.desc: Things get tense in the Malibu house when Walden's estranged ex-business partner shows up looking to bury the hatchet.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Rush
programme.desc: When Beverly gives Adam a "Best Son" trophy, Barry brings to her attention that she always favours Adam. Appalled, Beverly decides to ignore Adam (much to his delight) and smother Barry (much to his dislike), but it backfires.

programme.title: Mom: Lumbar Support and Old Pork
programme.desc: Bonnie has an unexpected reaction when she learns that Adam’s bar is doing well. Also, Christy and Tammy go on a double date.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: You've Got Male (or Female)
programme.desc: When Kristin entrusts Mike with her gender reveal party, he promptly holds it over Vanessa's head. Also, Chuck and Joe regret turning Ed’s spare room into an oversized dollhouse for Bonnie.

programme.title: Mom: Figgy Pudding and the Rapture
programme.desc: Christy convinces herself that everything is fine even though her family is basically homeless. Surprisingly, Bonnie is the one who tries to bring her back to reality.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Africa's Big Five
programme.desc: Jack travels to South Africa where it is possible to see some of the most recognizable animals of Africa. At the Shamwari Game Reserve, he encounters Africa's Big Five, including lions, rhinos and elephants.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Swamp Safari
programme.desc: Jack is on a safari through Florida's Everglades, where he encounters alligators and rattlesnakes, and gets a are look of the Native American traditions of the Seminole Tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Spectacular Serengeti
programme.desc: Jack and his grandson are on a Serengeti safari where they see cheetahs and lions on the savannah, wildebeest and zebra starting their migration, and visit a local school.

programme.title: This Old House: Trade School: Awnings, Countertops and Air Conditioning
programme.desc: A retractable awning is installed, soapstone countertops are sealed with wax for a durable finish and the half-walls get oak caps and scotia molding. The light fixtures are made by New England blacksmiths. Richard shares the importance of the ERV unit.

programme.title: Best Friends Furever With Kel Mitchell: Cow You Doin'?
programme.desc: Today, a hawk is only happy when on the trail with its long-tailed friend. Plus, a stubborn donkey and a Jersey cow become bovine besties.

programme.title: Tails of Valor: Running With Wings
programme.desc: Today, a therapy parrot perches proudly on her handler’s shoulder so he may get back on his feet. Plus, a therapy dog’s success inspires his handler’s niece to also seek the help of a therapy animal.

programme.title: House Smarts
programme.desc: Home improvement expert Lou Manfredini provides some serious home improvement tips.

programme.title: Raw Travel: When Travel Goes Wrong II
programme.desc: Explore more mistakes, misfires, misadventures, miscommunications, and miserable travel experiences.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Super Cop
programme.desc: Mike becomes hyper vigilant after his wallet is stolen from the squad car while taking a nap.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Joyce's Will Be Done
programme.desc: Molly is shocked when Joyce reveals she's leaving the house to Victoria in her will.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Old Man Corey
programme.desc: A 1966 Harley Davidson rides into the shop. Find out if Corey risks it all to cruise away with this chopper or if he suffers a major blowout. Then, Rick flashes back to the '60s when a collection of NBC promotional posters unroll in the shop.
